name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Republicans are attacking me for protecting voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84qyBoYcU9L7Swqa_uR3of28OOAJU2AOrQR7VgP2S8ruxg0vjuBVXjjqvsYG5-l6t6XsFKOkuWJSqk9Fnp_Xfosd7DNjrqv6cjTI0Nddnr2z_HiLg_MsSCKROf-fUcnsYqTWMqbmiR-TE8YwYEIUr4XS3sgayBApcHktYoA0UQflLaMC45j4wSSmoFAr8hlvdWkj6gFC3DOoThj4pQf-mtRjGifolD3ma-Ll1e7qBpT3EL2oEBp52PtzsrBPeIiODaT3aXY6UM_p527sdtGCC6pMDE7P65GemVC-IWQdSfKNEOc2tkcJqmJ2hYiN0RM0Xs_cDlRWTOpOBX39LThrNVhDOLFLww3QjpGY98cXiAxvc/3dz/8Vq7CQPxSMy5ahfavZ9njQ/h0/oATs60K16q0Z-uJ83ASzsd2YabD8K5AbKBcwsPH9rJk)
Derek -- Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand:

**FIRST:** Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats.

**THEN:** Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a _sweeping_ voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0."

**NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights — and _CNN_ confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection.

With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's _first ever_ Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights — but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.

**[So please, Derek: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between our campaign and Common Good VA so we can work together to fight back against GOP-led voter suppression efforts, keep Georgia blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84qyBoYcU9L7Swqa_uR3of28ISRRdXf107AIshh9MrOQfCDxBt4Lvlj5tDwsZaD-Uw8EWhkYRlI1iZ0NLeLicHADyWN_HaiCUw3GvTuOERlEHs0PyHoGEn_AT2s3gjwvmbELazlgweGSE16Bk9o0m9GLgueMY-Xwhp8TC08p-ucoz_1WQfUZt7YNqZsC_NmQdcs8BKNWLZLHvSYRRGDpPbq9bcB4IRcBuqBI3uFMnEjiM14cJdMGO6wQBTw7eG0_rDS4fJrMaEdX7bV_w8sk2Bd9p14kj4kIxK6WKKCHh_C5TGg97NTbXeLGnx-tuGNf9SY0SULM_xHzVyJiZoON7XFZkp37u_8eZjzdVrCwF2FnX/3dz/8Vq7CQPxSMy5ahfavZ9njQ/h1/kX9Vxtfx2LeRVF9n-ZQChWFVVgcq_68mX3vmd6-ysqU)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84msd3mTtlnPt00yLFKyHnCqYm3WFCq8EQYQBYbgxZ9kUhy--Sd9fAr0XUJnZ9dQrvqCBZK37z8ZrmHj3T8Y5giJ33SZVGWSRbmaWPbd93gkK9VrmbfDc2tmi9p6Dctz25XKxWOTn30qt-aagpJhTDWx0_pwsOFEPrwleOAc6bl05LaVqon2W5-hOEX7G2ttuf2ZRClVoK6awQSHEVsOHO8yKm6j3EADP_WbuzPGHyggCFWwxyi7J5te_tafkGi9efzM82iwMy6N0uF7a3zqGf_sdP7oa6sbDfK6kAO6RU7j9DSTfU1g2DdKoZFJzOLKVykc11FLAUtRIeQK7OtrQjOw-Ej5v-rwkD9bsOLrPu2mGs4fZ5dVFq00cRJ5gZv9txg/3dz/8Vq7CQPxSMy5ahfavZ9njQ/h2/pP77El8qbfibrqOrrXj7-uDgJYVF1S8FkuFcSGRNyNw)

body:
Let's Spread the Message |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=97451c9f03&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear , **I am starting the #ProveIt campaign right now.** I am sick and tired of the liberal officials and media gaslighting us with fictitious attacks about the election - but they are doing everything they can to STOP our forensic audits and efforts to find out the truth.

We’ve already shown evidence of fraud - now it’s time for them to prove it wasn’t.

**_So I want them to #ProveIt_** \- prove that there was no fraud in the election. Prove that the machines can't access the internet. Prove that the ballots are all there. Prove that the votes weren't changed. Prove that the 3 am November 4th vote dump was legitimate. Prove that sharpies weren't given to Trump voters on election day. Prove that our elections weren't hacked. Prove it!

If you agree that the #FakeNews and the liberal officials need to PROVE IT - [you can proudly show your stance by buying one of my Prove it T-Shirts now](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0d751afc36&e=44b8c466b0). You will be among the first to wear one as I literally just got back from the print shop myself.

Now, when you buy one I want everyone to take a picture of themselves, their families and friends with the T-Shirt on and post it to social media. _Tag my profile and use the hashtag #ProveIt._ In your post, state what you want the left to prove since they are making wild claims about the election.

I am about to get on a plane to fly and speak to a huge audience of thousands of people and I am going to put the shirt on in front of them. They will sell out like gangbusters - so that is why I am telling you before I go up on stage. I want you to have a chance to buy the first batch.

ORDER YOURS TODAY: [https://secure.anedot.com/mark-finchem-for-secretary-of-state/proveit](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4e9cdc47d0&e=44b8c466b0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Kick the Commies Out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Sick of AOC and Castro |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=88331a2ea1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Florida is the beacon of freedom and hope for the world right now.

Even as Biden drags the rest of the country into an inflation-induced malaise like Carter did, Florida is providing hope that freedom and America First policies provide hope for a brighter future than AOC, Biden and the Communist Dems.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c1ac893205&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who sides with AOC and her support for Communist Cuba, while really sticking it to Florida families. **

Soto campaigns as a moderate, but in reality he *hearts* AOC.

Here in Florida, we know Communist Cuba rather well. Millions of former Cubans fled Communism to come to Florida.

So when Cuba erupted in protest against the dictatorial Communist regime in Cuba, Floridians rose to support them. How could we not? _We saw better than anyone what Communism did to these people and their families._

**That is why I was infuriated when I saw AOC sticking up for Communist Cuba. Yup, it's true!**

_New York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says she is concerned that Republicans are laying the "groundwork for regime change" in Cuba.

Ocasio-Cortez was asked for her response to GOP lawmakers who have said the protests for freedom in Cuba are evidence that socialism and communism are flawed economic systems.

Ocasio-Cortez responded to members of her party arguing that the economic problems in Cuba, which is led by a communist regime, are about much more than sanctions.

"This issue is, it's not just one facet, but where the U.S. has historically been the most aggressive in and where, we, you know, in bringing up the embargo you're pointing to the U.S. role and U.S. actions because if you leave that gaping opening, my concern is that people are trying to lay the groundwork for regime change," Ocasio-Cortez said._

**So, Cuban Communist shock troopers are gunning down freedom protesters in the streets of Havana, but AOC thinks we need to defend the Cuban regime and lift sanctions on it?!?**

AOC is the typical out of touch modern Democrat: self-absorbed, historically ignorant, and Communist through and through.

Sadly, she's not alone.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=722890cf7c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**Washington, DC Mayor Bowser, a Democrat, actually ordered city workers to remove "Cuba Libre" from the street outside the Cuban Embassy!**__

_Washington, D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser’s administration has removed a slogan painted in front of the Cuban embassy supporting the Cuban protesters who have taken to the streets to oppose the country’s communist regime.

The message showed up on Friday and contained the phrase "Cuba Libre," which translates to "Free Cuba" and has often been used, especially on social media, to support the Cuban people who are currently clashing with Cuba’s government._

**And all this time, Darren Soto has NOT condemned wither AOC or Mayor Bowser. He doesn't stand with the free people of Cuba; he stands with the Communists!**

Florida Governor DeSantis knows better. He's not letting this be about "vaccines", as Biden claimed; or about sanctions. He knows it's a struggle against Communism, and that's what we have here in the U.S. as well!

_Governor Ron DeSantis who recently signed legislation into law that will mandate the teaching of the “evils of communism” in countries like Cuba in Florida schools says, “Florida supports the people of Cuba as they take to the streets against the tyrannical regime in Havana.”

“The Cuban dictatorship has repressed the people of Cuba for decades & is now trying to silence those who have the courage to speak out against its disastrous policies.”_

_[Help me get to Congress](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=922ba3c721&e=afa21b7626), and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda. I'll mandate the teaching of the evils of Communism like Gov. DeSantis did. And I'll help the free people of Cuba by extending internet and cell service to the island so the protesters won't be shut down by Cuba's dictator!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _He is a spineless career politician who wants NO PART of going up against me again!_

**He can't even condemn Communism, either here or abroad; I will fight for our freedoms, like Gov. DeSantis has done here in Florida!**

I won't back down, because [this is the year to take it back!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=140bfe283e&e=afa21b7626) I'm fired up to go to DC and stand up to AOC and Marxism. [If you are too, then join me](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=07e7ac7beb&e=afa21b7626)!

The Dems must go! [Help me fight Communism here in America!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fdd1499994&e=afa21b7626)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Heroic Vikings Coach - Says Dr Neil Shah
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heroic_rick_dennison&n=1)
---
Peter \-- ESPN reported on Friday that the Minnesota Vikings fired Assistant Coach Rick Dennison for refusing to get the COVID vaccine. And that defiance is "heroic" according to one doctor. **Dr Neil Shah, who owns a large, growing private practice in the Twin Cities, wrote an[article in Alpha News](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkCl49ZjmHgTJc4nDhK6DDvtznGkl3C9VJys80Zrw2_Bb4WFSx941VW1TvDuStXH_qkPlSYEdd-j6IC5gjb1vj5bPsdey5WwUHiMjVfWDlFbs&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heroic_rick_dennison&n=2) today defending Rick and our health freedom. According to Dr Shah...** _Coach Dennison is heroic in standing up for his health freedom at the expense of his job. What he puts in his own body is a decision that should be left up to him, not anyone else. It’s unbelievable that a statement like that seems out of the norm these days. Sadly, the last 17 months have acted as the largest assault on our civil liberties in modern times. It disturbs me to see the medical and scientific establishment eagerly demand the erosion of health autonomy based on a false argument that individual rights can be cancelled for some “greater good.”_ I agree with Dr Shah \- Rick Dennison is heroic for taking a stance. As many of you know, it's not easy to go against the cultural norm these days. Especially when your job is at stake. When you go up against the COVID Cultists and the media, you end up on the receiving end of hate and unflattering labels. Here's the headline from Fox News this afternoon. This story appears to have a twist though. The media is walking back the ESPN statement from Friday and are reporting that Rick still has his job. Taking a courageous stance may have worked out in the end! **If we give up on health freedom in this country, we are no better than our enemies. This is an important right that MUST be protected. Why aren't more doctors and medical professionals joining Dr Neil Shah and speaking out?** This isn't going to stop with the Vikings organization. It's coming to our jobs, schools and social organizations. It will affect YOU and it will affect me! **We need more courageous people standing up for what they believe in. And we definitely need more good doctors like Dr Neil Shah speaking up for our health freedom!** **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heroic_rick_dennison&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heroic_rick_dennison&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heroic_rick_dennison&n=5), software for leaders.

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023519:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023518:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023520:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023521:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023522:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023523:6DkWytlNq:m:1:3253819041:3978377DC65086D6AD87A7B7ACBDB912:r)

But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Vernon Jones
subject: [Poll] Replace Electronic Voting Machines with Paper Ballots? >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58023606:J0JfltlON:m:1:3253819041:C3AAC36383618E35AC1CA137CC6D74A6:r)
---
| Peter,
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Defeating DeSantis.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
My friend Charlie needs your support to defeat Ron DeSantis.
|
---

| | This is Rep. Adam Schiff, team. I have a lot to say. But first I have an important ask for you:

**[Will you make a contribution right now to help my friend Charlie Crist raise $15,000 before his end of the month deadline? Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1oB2h59AqNBvg_5CYkI0uQ==/6l442IwraWlkDq74se71jA==?refcode=20210728_f_1_fl&amount=20)**

I've known Charlie for a long time. We've served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I've seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor's mansion just as he has for years in Congress.

On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together - but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. And by watching him jockey to use his platform to be the successor to Donald Trump in 2024.

Things haven't gotten much better since DeSantis left the House to become Governor of Florida. He's put more attention into building his profile and trying to disenfranchise voters in his state than trying to help the people of Florida recover from the worst pandemic any of us have ever endured.

It's absolutely critical that we defeat DeSantis. And I believe my friend Charlie is the one to beat him next year. But knowing the modern-day Republican Party, they are going to do everything they can to keep DeSantis in office and tear down Charlie as he seeks to represent the people of Florida.

**So right now, your contribution is critical. Charlie is ready to set the tone for the race and he needs your help to do it. Please make a donation to Charlie 's campaign today and help them hit their $15,000 goal.** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/1oB2h59AqNBvg_5CYkI0uQ==/6l442IwraWlkDq74se71jA==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210728_f_1_fl&amount=5)
[DONATE $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/1oB2h59AqNBvg_5CYkI0uQ==/6l442IwraWlkDq74se71jA==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210728_f_1_fl&amount=25)
[DONATE $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/1oB2h59AqNBvg_5CYkI0uQ==/6l442IwraWlkDq74se71jA==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210728_f_1_fl&amount=50)
[DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/1oB2h59AqNBvg_5CYkI0uQ==/6l442IwraWlkDq74se71jA==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210728_f_1_fl&amount=100)
[OTHER](https://act.myngp.com/el/1oB2h59AqNBvg_5CYkI0uQ==/6l442IwraWlkDq74se71jA==?refcode=20210728_f_1_fl)
We need to flip Florida blue once again. And you can play a role in that today. Thank you for all you do.

\-- Adam Schiff

****

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Pelosi Republicans are a worse than Democrats
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c231%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7KOLKd851Rb02tMpBqNMqg&sysid=1)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4444%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SaLNkx5qeFl4k9OCzRVerQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
Some things MUST be done. If a Republican Congressman votes to IMPEACH the Republican President...
**If he stands up and tries to make a career on liberal TV shows trashing the President, his voters and his party...**
**And then if he JOINS the PELOSI WITCH-HUNT commission?**
There's NO DOUBT he has to go.
That’s why I’m running to send Adam Kinzinger home for being the biggest RINO in Congress! (And that’s saying something).
**[Will you stand with me today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65555%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gYcLZLyFM9toLpaHE6bLxg&sysid=1)**
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4444%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SaLNkx5qeFl4k9OCzRVerQ&sysid=1)
Adam Kinzinger has gone off the deep end. He no longer represents the values of our district or the voters who put him in office.
He should be THE top target along with Liz Cheney to be sent home next year.
But that won’t happen without [YOUR support today](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65556%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O8Hqf757q%2fzTP3C3dCPwmw&sysid=1).
**Do you support President Trump? DO YOU want to help me send his biggest enemy in our party PACKING?**
**[Then stand alongside me and President Trump today, and we will do it!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65557%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S6Y1DhAcGYXV87gBHTL8RA&sysid=1)** | | | | [Chip in $25](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65558%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NcCU2qiXbfyWTPz5V2xHXQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | [Chip in $50](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65559%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UrF9nkTyUBKIA0zmWKEPpA&sysid=1)
---
| | | [Chip in $100](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65550%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JrE%2fKorqZx8TOvau7qbS1Q&sysid=1)
---
Unfortunately, the Never-Trumpers and far-Left billionaires have made sure Adam is well-funded. He raised over $1 MILLION last quarter with no signs of slowing up.

If we want to send this RINO home, we have to make sure our race is well-funded.

**[That’s why I’m asking every Patriotic Trump supporter in American to join my fight...today!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65551%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cc%2fWMUTUXsZhcCzKXzkfjA&sysid=1)**

You and I CAN do this. We can send Adam Kinzinger home, and we can make sure a real conservative Republican takes his place.

I’ll stand up for our shared values. I’ll...
* **Protect** your wallets by always voting for lower taxes and spending;

* **Protect** your 2nd Amendment rights against gun-grabber ally Adam;

* **Stand Up** to the liberal mob instead of rushing to join them like Adam; AND

* **Fight** to keep your job, business and schools open!

There’s no bigger fight in a Congressional race in America right now.

No matter where you live, you can be a part of sending the biggest Trump-hating RINO in DC home and send a true conservative and a new voice to Washington to take his place.

**[I’ll stand up and fight. AND I’m counting on you to stand with me!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65552%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fg6bd23dmpcsx7CAiybDXA&sysid=1)**

| | | [DONATE!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65553%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ldMcyLKJFtNBSNu0yn3yGw&sysid=1)
---
Thanks in advance for your continued generous support!

Yours in the fight for liberty,

Catalina Lauf
Candidate for Congress
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4444%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SaLNkx5qeFl4k9OCzRVerQ&sysid=1)

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c231%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7KOLKd851Rb02tMpBqNMqg&sysid=1)_

|

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
It’s going to take a huge amount of resources to break through.
#

Elections shouldn’t be decided by which candidate raises the most money.
They should be decided by the people, based on their values and priorities.
But the truth is, it’s going to take a huge amount of resources to win this race.
Pennsylvania is the most important Senate race of 2022, and money is going to be a big factor in our ability to get our message out and build a broad coalition of folks supporting our fight for working families.
Our movement is for working people, powered by working people. We’re funded by lots of folks giving small amounts of money. Each donation is an investment in our fight for equality and justice for all.
**And on Saturday, our campaign faces an important challenge — our July fundraising deadline. So, I need to come out and ask you directly:**
[Can you make your first donation to own a piece of our movement today? We need to bring in 500 more donations by our deadline, and every contribution, no matter the size, goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33111970/297878064/-353695395?refcode2=b97cf11d-acef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210728-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTdjZjExZC1hY2VmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIz_XT0h6CZzXEQsSPF6GLZcz3psg9xNK1vO8O0ZpTo=)

clean_body: We’ve got to start taking this seriously | | | = | | Derek, what’s it going to take? President Joe Biden just sounded the alarm about how important it is for Terry to win this November. But it’s been five days since his visit and we still haven’t seen the boost in fundraising we were hoping for. With polls tied and Youngkin outspending us on the airwaves, this is the worst time to lose momentum, Derek. Look, President Biden made it very clear. He’s counting on us to beat Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate in Virginia. He wasn’t exaggerating when he said the future of defending our democracy starts here. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = It’s going to take a massive influx of small-dollar contributions to match resources with Glenn Youngkin and his $75 million, but I know this team won’t let me down. name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Roe v. Wade depends on just FIVE House seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Friend,
The moment the decision in Roe v. Wade was decided nearly 50 years ago, extremist anti-choice forces launched a decades long crusade to control what people can and can’t do with their bodies.
Last week, when Mississippi’s Attorney General asked the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade, they made it clear they think they can win in the courts. They may be right.
Right now, a pro-choice Congressional majority is the last firewall against this radical, anti-woman, anti-family agenda.
Five seats. That’s all that’s standing between us and losing the right for ALL Americans to make the best choices for themselves and their families.
Rights that extend beyond the right to choose and cut to the core of a woman’s access to healthcare, prescriptions and the privacy of her relationship with her doctor.
JUST $5 CAN HELP US PROTECT REPRODUCTIVE FREEDOMS IN AMERICA. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=50]
Let me be clear— I support a woman’s right to choose. Period. But I also believe in funding support programs and resources that make abortion less necessary. Period. Always have, always will.
YOUR CONTRIBUTION CAN PROTECT AND GROW THE FIVE VOTES PROTECTING YOUR FREEDOM. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=50]
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=50]
$100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=100] $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=250]
$500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=500] $1,000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=1000]
Not only has Scott Perry called for the Supreme Court to "reconsider" the landmark Roe V. Wade decision , he and his extremist allies in Congress have:
* Introduced
561
abortion
restrictions
,
including
165
abortion
bans,
in
47
states.
*
Enacted
83
abortion
restrictions
in
16
states,
including
10
bans
.
*
Voted
against
workplace
protections
for
pregnant
people.
*
Voted
repeatedly
to
repeal
and
weaken
the
ACA
-
eliminating
access
to
healthcare
for
women
and
their
families.
Now, with states like Mississippi asking the court to reconsider Roe vs. Wade, we need Congress to take action. Protecting and growing the pro-choice Congressional majority in 2022 is critical.
This battle--to control women’s bodies and control Congress--comes down to just five seats, and our district is on the front lines. We have a historic and critical opportunity to defeat a leading radical, anti-choice Republican, flip a swing district, and expand the pro-choice majority in Congress.
Join me in this fight to defeat Scott Perry and defend a woman's right to choose. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_roe_20210728&amount=25]
We can not afford to lose this race, and I can’t do it alone. Thank you for your support.
Thanks,
Eugene

| | Y'all,

I wanted to take this opportunity to introduce myself as DPVA’s new Deputy Finance Director. Growing up just south of Galax, in deeply rural & Republican North Carolina, I learned that so many of our rights weren’t just granted to us -- they were fought for by folks, from grassroots activists to legislators in capitals around the nation.

From civil rights and voting rights to the right to choose and the right to marry the person you love -- Democrats have been fighting for folks like me and so many others.

While Democrats have been working to protect our rights, the Virginia GOP has made it a priority to roll back all the progress we have made over the last few years -- that’s what we’re fighting against.

I know that Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring will fight for us every day -- they’ve been doing it for years. But they can’t fight for our future unless we have their backs today.

That’s why I’m asking -- **[will you join me in supporting Virginia Democrats all around the Commonwealth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33115125/297888794/-1538096522?refcode=ris_20210728_e_f_us_na_na_eom3nd&refcode2=rti&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODg4MjBhYi1iMWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkkiuLrKJPoPbbVX3UDsz1nOAV3Yg_Vl8JJjYVhmeq8=)**

Thank you and I look forward to working alongside you,
Randy | **********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33115126/297888795/-1538096522?refcode=ris_20210728_e_f_us_na_na_eom3nd&refcode2=rti&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODg4MjBhYi1iMWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkkiuLrKJPoPbbVX3UDsz1nOAV3Yg_Vl8JJjYVhmeq8=)**********

clean_body: | = | | Y'all, I wanted to take this opportunity to introduce myself as DPVA’s new Deputy Finance Director. Growing up just south of Galax, in deeply rural & Republican North Carolina, I learned that so many of our rights weren’t just granted to us -- they were fought for by folks, from grassroots activists to legislators in capitals around the nation. From civil rights and voting rights to the right to choose and the right to marry the person you love -- Democrats have been fighting for folks like me and so many others. While Democrats have been working to protect our rights, the Virginia GOP has made it a priority to roll back all the progress we have made over the last few years -- that’s what we’re fighting against. I know that Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring will fight for us every day -- they’ve been doing it for years. But they can’t fight for our future unless we have their backs today. That’s why I’m asking -- = Thank you and I look forward to working alongside you, Randy | ********=****** ******=******** | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States

This doesn’t bode well for the upcoming midterm elections. If fundraising stays low, Republicans could clobber our candidates on the airwaves, and we won’t have the resources to adequately defend them.
Mitch McConnell and the Republican money-machine are squeezing every cent they can out of their far-right donors — **and Donald Trump is helping out too.**
It’s clear that we need to catch up FAST. If Republicans continue making advances in fundraising that we’re unable to match, it’s possible that we could lose our Democratic Senate majority and be unable to continue delivering progress on the issues that matter.
Health care, voting rights, and infrastructure are all on the table. A Republican Senate with Mitch McConnell back in charge will obstruct our work at every turn. So we need to do everything we can right now to not fall even further behind.
**Help Defend the Senate protect vulnerable Democrats and fight back against the GOP’s far-right megadonor network. Make a contribution right now before our Saturday fundraising deadline.**

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: We’re launching an 88 county tour…
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014m2idCDhkav8IUR7dzqzspwARQPapfMNNd5F4WLnoaG4SvSyddo8R2KB59oNpDnkPeYvAv4PSPGOSHcacUIBSLwXQZQQHH-N3DwR-lUX-mIa14qJuJioNDELzIlDFraZj2UZdpDZNe0eRxraNLP7RR3hUQbp7hcO8BBDKekVgWB01hVrjMv0Jw==&c=PknfWpruYRV7SOMF7muy-MBJpYnCzf8hPTvzfpv5KC0vMkiHuGkaaw==&ch=oPGXdMfqki5wCSpmKalQd_WcJ__sQ7cbkhplzhan6OImG0TD9M_FuA==)
---
| Peter,
Today, my campaign announced that we will launch a two-month statewide tour where I will personally make campaign appearances in each of Ohio's 88 counties.
---
|
---
| The tour will begin in Cuyahoga, Stark, and Portage Counties THIS SUNDAY- August 1st and continue through the end of September.
I enjoy meeting voters and building relationships based on our common bond over the belief in American greatness, which is why I am excited about this tour!
Ohioans are seeking a conservative voice in their next Senator who will stand up to the left to secure our borders, protect our right to bear arms, and defend the sanctity of life. I believe I am that guy.
Other counties included in the first week of the tour include Montgomery, Hamilton, Butler, Franklin, Union, Medina, Wood, Lucas, Sandusky, Ottawa, Meigs, Athens, Gallia, Monroe, Noble, and Washington.
This new tour will add even more firepower to our already powerful grassroots campaign.

**THEN:** We learned the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) outraised its Democratic counterpart by $9 million in the second quarter.

Team Schrier

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A National Republican Super PAC just spent another $1 MILLION against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Senator Warner said I could reach out with an important request ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33118980/297903694/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYzMjc0ZC1iYmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X2Ogie3UxgRj7fbX7DB-WUlbneMwWMBq6ozg42h1AYw=&emci=17de3019-3aef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a1f3274d-bbef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Senator Warner said I could reach out with an important request ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. **One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, recently dropped another $1 million on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better -- a team of people who I know will always have my back. **And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:** **_[If you are able, will you split a $5 donation between our people-powered campaign and Senator Mark Warner? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33118981/297903695/1778020157?refcode=mw_em_210727_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYzMjc0ZC1iYmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X2Ogie3UxgRj7fbX7DB-WUlbneMwWMBq6ozg42h1AYw=)_** As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, Mark Kelly **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33118982/297903696/1778020157?refcode=mw_em_210727_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYzMjc0ZC1iYmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X2Ogie3UxgRj7fbX7DB-WUlbneMwWMBq6ozg42h1AYw=)**

* * *
---
|
---
| Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

subject: The gap is closing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33119777/297907443/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzhkYTVkNy1iY2VmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zB2LfJzQQOpaKqk3algpKtvdABmVYevYHnjp3er3hac=&emci=f400bf52-e1ee-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cc8da5d7-bcef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

We know you’re getting a ton of emails right now so we’ll keep this short. In 2020, Christy was only 333 votes away from winning. We’ve crunched the numbers and know what we need to close the gap this cycle.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

**July End-of-Month Fundraising Deadline
Goal:** $14,000
**Deadline:** 7/31
**Suggested Donation:** $5
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33121522/297914687/-748347061?refcode2=3318cd1c-c0ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210728-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzE4Y2QxYy1jMGVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM5PqlwBv2-um__iUcg4Qxb0qcvIjTu78BYVIScNXYQ=)**
I’m reaching out to ask if you can make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, to help my team and I hit our July end-of-month goal.
We’ve set an ambitious goal of $14,000, so any amount you can give will go a long way. If you’re already ready to make that contribution, **[you can do so here,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33121523/297914688/-748347061?refcode2=3318cd1c-c0ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210728-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzE4Y2QxYy1jMGVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM5PqlwBv2-um__iUcg4Qxb0qcvIjTu78BYVIScNXYQ=)** but if you’d like to hear more first, please keep reading.
My progressive colleagues and I are beginning to make progress on a number of issues that will improve the lives of working Americans. Just recently, I introduced the Inclusive Elections Act, which will restore the portion of the Voting Rights Act that the Supreme Court dismantled in its recent decision.
And the rollout of the child tax credit - which my Democratic colleagues I fought to include in the American Rescue Plan - has been an enormous success.
**But the truth is we still have a long way to go. Many of the legislative priorities I’m fighting for won’t be possible if we don’t abolish the filibuster. And we’re going up against a lot of resistance, both from Republicans and a few members of our own party.**
Our movement has a lot of work to do, and I am working overtime to get it done.
But in order to keep up this fight, I have to ensure that my re-election campaign has the funds it needs to fight off any primary and Republican challengers. Last cycle, the field included several self-funded candidates trying to buy this seat. We have to prepare for that to happen again.
**[So if you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our ambitious end-of-month goal so that I can remain focused on championing progressive priorities in Congress, not fundraising for re-election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33121524/297914689/-748347061?refcode2=3318cd1c-c0ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210728-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzE4Y2QxYy1jMGVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OM5PqlwBv2-um__iUcg4Qxb0qcvIjTu78BYVIScNXYQ=)**
Thank you, as always, for your ongoing support. It truly means so much.
Onward,
Mondaire

subject: Working-class Americans are being forgotten

body:
It’s time to tax the rich and defend America’s disappearing working class.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33121911/297915838/-1668467654?refcode=em_fr_210728TAXES_n_ja_90do_7_ng_testB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjNlMDkwYS1jMWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrSUykRd6HxoGvJ9dSQRffKQkfIgufp1ExpRGwbr4BA=) Friend, Last week, the richest man in the world spent **$5.5 billion for four minutes in space** , while the employees who paid his way worked under grueling, inhumane conditions for meager wages. Let’s be clear — it’s time that wealthy corporations and the one percent start paying their fair share in taxes and raising the wages of the American people. As economic inequality continues to increase and millions of Americans are still feeling the impact of the pandemic, it’s unconscionable that so many at the top fail to recognize the people who make their wealth possible. For too long, millionaires and billionaires have played by a different set of rules in this country — aided by Republican politicians eager to give their corporate donors more tax breaks and loopholes at the expense of working families. Enough is enough. **Congress must make millionaires, billionaires, and corporations pay their fair share, pay a living wage, and provide all employees with basic benefits.** [**_NextGen is dedicated to fighting for working-class Americans and an economy that ensures dignity and opportunity for all. We’re working every day to elect representatives who understand the plight of workers and will fight for an equitable future. Will you stand with us in the fight for the working families by donating $25, $50, or whatever you can afford today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33121912/297915839/-199292867?refcode=em_fr_210728TAXES_n_ja_90do_7_ng_testB_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjNlMDkwYS1jMWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrSUykRd6HxoGvJ9dSQRffKQkfIgufp1ExpRGwbr4BA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33121913/297915840/-199292867?refcode=em_fr_210728TAXES_n_ja_90do_7_ng_testB_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjNlMDkwYS1jMWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrSUykRd6HxoGvJ9dSQRffKQkfIgufp1ExpRGwbr4BA=)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big Tech lawsuit FILED - Free speech on the line Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58028062:6AiCvtlNG:m:1:3253819041:4859C41E979D11AB11370850DBB9F1D0:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

clean_body: Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents... And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. Then it happened ... After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. clean_body: But not without your help! | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Listen, Peter... The Midterm Elections have already started. Democrats are planning their attacks on Red States like Florida at this very instant! The midterms will define the very future of our nation. Whether we embrace President Trump’s America First policies , or give in to the demands of the Radical Left -- the choice is up to YOU. There is no battleground state more essential to our success than Florida. Trump-Endorsed Senator Marco Rubio NEEDS to win re-election if we’re going to reclaim the Majority! | | | | | | President Trump is here to stay. He’s NEVER going to stop fighting to SAVE AMERICA. But he can’t do it without you, Peter. He needs your help to Keep Florida Red and win back the Republican Senate Majority in 2022. | Thank you. Republican Senate Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

clean_body: 1 HOUR LEFT | Our End-of-Month fundraising deadline is near, and we're calling on our best supporters to ensure we CRUSH our goal. Friend, We need you. Our End-of-Month fundraising deadline is near, and we're calling on our best supporters to ensure we CRUSH our goal. You've always been one of our TOP Patriots and a loyal ally to President Trump, but recently we noticed your support has faltered. Are you still on our side? There is a lot on the line here. It is CRITICAL that we win backPresident Trump's majority AND safeguard the future of America for generations to come. That's why we decided to up the stakes and give you another chance. This EXCLUSIVE offer doesn't come often, and we cannot guarantee it ever will again. Don't wait. President Trump never stops fighting for you, and now it's your turn to fight for him. We will be updating our End-of-Month supporter list soon and want to put your name back at the TOP. Can we count on you? name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The FBI raided my apartment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
body:
They put a bull’s eye on my back. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c233%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CnpR0LrnG%2bj%2b4%2bI0QMtRHQ&sysid=1)

They put a bull’s eye on my back.
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65573%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bUTNDwhjaFwAqo2%2bwWxGtA&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
---
You may truly be my only hope.
---
I’m not exaggerating when I say that I’m fighting for my freedom.
---
At 6:00 in the morning, there was a loud BANG outside my door. 7 FBI agents presented a warrant to raid my apartment and seize electronic devices from my home.
---
The Deep State is on a mission to take down every single one of President Trump’s closest allies -- and that puts me at the top of the list.
---
_Because I know you’ve been a loyal ally of our movement as well, I’m turning to you at this dire moment to help protect me from the Deep State’s war on my rights and freedom._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to protect me as I fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65574%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A5kkBgWBvs7BNHlHAe65gw&sysid=1)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65585%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yMQ9nUiXNGmAB7PB7Em28w&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65586%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wHKlbcHXYbXY4o8%2by0OeQA&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65587%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MaGQiUggd0zygDbkDaMGWA&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65588%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAhEy8tdmGDHWUFYeTDywg&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65589%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1BiHKgTncSsSAGtulYFeTg&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65580%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sh1pl7dfRQClNGU96IfgCw&sysid=1)**
---
While many Republicans walked away from President Trump at the first sign of a fight, I NEVER wavered.
---
I stood by the President’s side throughout his toughest battles:
---
**Two baseless impeachment trials
The Russia witch hunt
Exposing the Biden Family’s corruption
Uncovering election fraud **
---
You see, we were on a mission to drain the swamp and put the American people first. We knew that the Deep State forces would try to destroy us.
---
But we didn’t care. The fight to save America was a fight worth waging.
---
_Unfortunately, now that Biden and Kamala have seized control of the White House and have weaponized the FBI and DOJ, the swamp is REVOLTING by placing a bull’s eye on the backs of every Trump loyalist who had the guts to challenge the Deep State._
---
I’m hoping you’ll stand up for me now that the Deep State has placed a bull’s eye on my back.
---
**[CONTRIBUTE TO DEFEND RUDY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65581%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lOPYLN2d9alMxY4bfikhFA&sysid=1)**
---
As Alan Dershowitz wisely pointed out, “In banana republics, in ... many parts of the world, when a candidate loses for president, they go after the candidate, they go after his lawyers, they go after his friends... That’s happening in America now. They’re going after Rudy Giuliani.”
---
That’s why this is so important, Friend.
---
This battle is not just about me or any of President Trump’s other allies who are being ruthlessly targeted by the Deep State.
---
We need to face the uncomfortable fact that if the Deep State can do this to a former president’s confidante who did nothing wrong, then one day, they could do it to you.
---
My fate will determine if America still is a Republic governed by We The People, or if the swamp has finally amassed total control of our great country.
---
That's why I urgently need YOUR help as I battle for my freedom and justice.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to protect me as I fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65582%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HX03NHdqXp9JZ%2bnhb3kzkA&sysid=1)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65573%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bUTNDwhjaFwAqo2%2bwWxGtA&sysid=1)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund.
---

name: Team Never Again
subject: Trump is a white supremacist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
We may have defeated Donald Trump last November, but reports are still coming out about the offensive and disgusting things he's done over his presidency. A new book claims that on a trip to Paris in 2018, Trump told his chief of staff John Kelly: "Well, Hitler did a lot of good things." name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=2C=20me?=
subject: Virginia can't afford the alternative.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/80210d796b03/virginia-cant-afford-the-alternative?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=ae1bda8e87&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Friends-

I went down to Harrisonburg this past weekend to stump for the Democratic candidates down there. I graduated from James Madison University back in 2016, so I went from the frying pan into the fire as I have said before. But driving back, I thought about how far we have come since then.

How many of us in took that call to action to get off the sidelines and into the game because it was on us to make sure that we would not sit idly by and watch one person try to destroy our country and you know what? We did exactly what

We flipped the House, we flipped the House of Delegates, We flipped the State Senate, We flipped the Senate, and we took back the White House just like we said we would all the way back in January of 2017.
[Let's Keep the Fight Going](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=5cfaccee34&e=76fc145c69)
Here in Virginia, we may have won the battle but the war is still raging on. We have a similar scenario to what we had in 2016. We have a lot of folks feeling apathetic and complacent in elections and they’re exhausted. Boy, I’m tired too, but we gotta keep moving.

We have a lot of people feeling frustrated that their voices aren’t being heard. But it’s on us again to lift them up and unite together because we cannot afford the alternative. It’s on us to show them that Democrats will deliver on the things that they need us to because we have done just that since 2019.

It’s on us to infuse those people with the hope and the motivation we need them to have by showing them that we realize that the issues they care about most are not some radical, leftist agenda. These are basic. Basic human rights.

You wanna know what else? Because the stuff that is happening in Texas, in Florida, and throughout the south, limiting the right to vote, making it harder for people to get to the ballot box, all of that will be here before you know it.
[We must stop them before it's too late. Help out now.](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=90c498d316&e=76fc145c69)
We cannot afford that. We cannot afford to wake up and realize that we have regressed decades backwards. We cannot afford to go back. The teacher who commutes 2 hours one way can’t afford that. The construction worker who is currently being misclassified as an independent contractor can’t afford that. The trans student sitting in her classroom wondering why other students’ parents are more concerned about where she goes to the bathroom than why there aren’t enough books on the shelves cannot afford that. We must- WE MUST elect Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, Mark Herring, and every single Democratic Nominee throughout Virginia because even with Democrats of all backgrounds, we can deliver for Virginia and as one of our favorite Virginia candidates used to say [“Keep the Big Boys Honest.”](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=95789e9654&e=76fc145c69) Racial Justice is on the ballot. Social Justice is on the Ballot. Environmental Justice is on the Ballot. Economic Justice is on the ballot. Let's go to work.
---
|
In Solidarity,

Matt Royer

---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Friends- I went down to Harrisonburg this past weekend to stump for the Democratic candidates down there. I graduated from James Madison University back in 2016, so I went from the frying pan into the fire as I have said before. But driving back, I thought about how far we have come since then. How many of us in took that call to action to get off the sidelines and into the game because it was on us to make sure that we would not sit idly by and watch one person try to destroy our country and you know what? We did exactly what We flipped the House, we flipped the House of Delegates, We flipped the State Senate, We flipped the Senate, and we took back the White House just like we said we would all the way back in January of 2017. Here in Virginia, we may have won the battle but the war is still raging on. We have a similar scenario to what we had in 2016. We have a lot of folks feeling apathetic and complacent in elections and they’re exhausted. Boy, I’m tired too, but we gotta keep moving. We have a lot of people feeling frustrated that their voices aren’t being heard. But it’s on us again to lift them up and unite together because we cannot afford the alternative. It’s on us to show them that Democrats will deliver on the things that they need us to because we have done just that since 2019. It’s on us to infuse those people with the hope and the motivation we need them to have by showing them that we realize that the issues they care about most are not some radical, leftist agenda. These are basic. Basic human rights. You wanna know what else? Because the stuff that is happening in Texas, in Florida, and throughout the south, limiting the right to vote, making it harder for people to get to the ballot box, all of that will be here before you know it. We cannot afford that. We cannot afford to wake up and realize that we have regressed decades backwards. We cannot afford to go back. The teacher who commutes 2 hours one way can’t afford that. The construction worker who is currently being misclassified as an independent contractor can’t afford that. The trans student sitting in her classroom wondering why other students’ parents are more concerned about where she goes to the bathroom than why there aren’t enough books on the shelves cannot afford that. We must- WE MUST elect Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, Mark Herring, and every single Democratic Nominee throughout Virginia because even with Democrats of all backgrounds, we can deliver for Virginia and as one of our favorite Virginia candidates used to say Racial Justice is on the ballot. Social Justice is on the Ballot. Environmental Justice is on the Ballot. Economic Justice is on the ballot. Let's go to work. | In Solidarity, Matt Royer | "Help Out" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC Our Mailing Address is: PO Box 101547 Arlington, VA 22210 Want to change how you receive these emails? Here's the thing about Ron Johnson, Peter: He's too busy doing Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's bidding to care about Wisconsin workers and families. That's why he spends his days spreading conspiracy theories and blocking progress with the archaic filibuster.

I couldn't be more different. When I first ran for public office, it wasn't for fame, money, or power -- it was because politicians like Scott Walker closed the door on the rest of us. I believed Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting in their corner and looking out for their best interests, not bending to the will of wealthy donors and corporate interests.

**That's why I'm running for U.S. Senate.** This will be one of the most closely watched Senate races in the country, and I’m confident we can take on Ron Johnson to flip this seat and expand our majority. Can I count on your support to help fuel our grassroots campaign for the long haul?

[**If you’re in a position to donate, please help us reach our 10,000 grassroots donors goal so we have the necessary resources to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat and give working families the leadership they deserve in Washington. Chip in $5.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33127078/297932995/-1598864484?gpsid=31_130_19954&refcode=em21_210728_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210728_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjNmNzFhZC1jZGVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUEET5hAh-UNoqMxHw4dFWHoXFc6fGYM3Hsx434JQIQ=)

As you know, I’m not taking any donations from corporate PACs, so we could really use your support here.

Thank you,

Sarah
