body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33127265/297933709/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210728_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_RA_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg1Y2MzZC1jZWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdGftwZoKJPw16Rls5zRLMvIfURljl1eHzA7ZqOZFmQ=&emci=2c85cc3d-ceef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2f85cc3d-ceef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Hey there — I was pulled away last week for a family emergency (everyone is okay now!), but I’m catching up and wanted to make sure you are updated on all Martin and our team have been busy with ahead of our end-of-month deadline:
* Martin has been hard at work on the Senate floor, fighting to ensure that bold climate action is included in the reconciliation package, Tribes have access to clean water, our wildlife and their habitats are conserved, and you have the support you need right now. Thanks to his work alongside his Democratic colleagues, New Mexicans will now see millions in funding for emergency housing vouchers and support for students and educators at K-12 schools.

* With Republicans’ Senate fundraising arm raking in _**$28 million**_ last quarter alone, our campaign team is working to defend Democratic Senate seats and hold our majority. We’re also making strong investments in local county parties in New Mexico to build Democratic power up and down the ballot.

* **We’re falling short of our end-of-month fundraising goal with just a few days to go.** Grassroots donations are critical to powering our work, so I’m asking:

**Will you chip in any amount you can to help us catch up on fundraising and keep up this important work?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33127266/297933710/930784506?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210728_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_RA_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg1Y2MzZC1jZWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdGftwZoKJPw16Rls5zRLMvIfURljl1eHzA7ZqOZFmQ=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33127267/297933711/930784506?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210728_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_RA_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg1Y2MzZC1jZWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdGftwZoKJPw16Rls5zRLMvIfURljl1eHzA7ZqOZFmQ=)

clean_body: Hey there — I was pulled away last week for a family emergency (everyone is okay now!), but I’m catching up and wanted to make sure you are updated on all Martin and our team have been busy with ahead of our end-of-month deadline: Martin has been hard at work on the Senate floor, fighting to ensure that bold climate action is included in the reconciliation package, Tribes have access to clean water, our wildlife and their habitats are conserved, and you have the support you need right now. Thanks to his work alongside his Democratic colleagues, New Mexicans will now see millions in funding for emergency housing vouchers and support for students and educators at K-12 schools. With Republicans’ Senate fundraising arm raking in $28 million last quarter alone, our campaign team is working to defend Democratic Senate seats and hold our majority. We’re also making strong investments in local county parties in New Mexico to build Democratic power up and down the ballot. We’re falling short of our end-of-month fundraising goal with just a few days to go. Grassroots donations are critical to powering our work, so I’m asking: Will you chip in any amount you can to help us catch up on fundraising and keep up this important work?** If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in. name: Elaine Luria
subject: Why this race matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33127593/297935001/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY5N2UwMS1jZmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-u-8C7cM97EP415894P3RBuri5UH4OJ2qvM_aVXBkE0=)

| | Folks, Representing one of the closest swing districts in the nation isn’t easy -- _there’s a lot at stake in the race for VA-02._ **Democracy & Integrity**
The midterms will serve as a barometer of our country’s Democratic values and integrity -- the choice is clear in our race. My opponent, Jen Kiggans, won’t admit that President Biden won the 2020 election. She’s feeding into the lies and conspiracy theories that resulted in an unprecedented attack on our democracy. You can count on me to always lead with integrity and to uphold the Democratic values on which our nation was built. **Climate Change**
Coastal communities like ours are already experiencing the consequences of climate change. I’m a champion for bold climate action that will help curb greenhouse gas emissions, reduce dependency on fossil fuels, and create good, clean jobs. I’ll never stop fighting for policies to safeguard Coastal Virginians’ homes and livelihoods -- the same can’t be said for my Republican opponents. **Our Democratic House Majority**
This seat is vital for maintaining our Democratic House Majority. As you know, Republicans only need to regain _5 seats_ to take back control of the House. VA-02 currently has a rating of R+1, so we have an uphill battle ahead of us to win this race. We overcame the odds last year, and I know we can do it again -- _all the progress our Democratic House Majority has worked for is at stake._ **The outcome of this race will have far-reaching implications -- help me make sure they’re positive ones for our district and our democracy.[Please make a $25 donation today before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33127594/297935002/1950071767?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210728_FR_ALotAtStakeEOM2_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY5N2UwMS1jZmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-u-8C7cM97EP415894P3RBuri5UH4OJ2qvM_aVXBkE0=)** | | | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33127601/297935007/-1706573780?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210728_FR_ALotAtStakeEOM2_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY5N2UwMS1jZmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-u-8C7cM97EP415894P3RBuri5UH4OJ2qvM_aVXBkE0=)

name: NC Republicans
subject: Priority #1: Defend Our Senate Seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
We can’t win back the Majority without North Carolina.

| Peter, We need your help with something huge. To win back the Republican Senate Majority, we need to win in the battleground state of North Carolina. But the Democrats are pouring millions of dollars into the state from all across America. They’re totally focused on flipping this Republican State “blue” in 2022. North Carolina delivered for President Trump in 2020. clean_body: We can’t win back the Majority without North Carolina. | Peter, We need your help with something huge. To win back the Republican Senate Majority, we need to win in the battleground state of North Carolina. But the Democrats are pouring millions of dollars into the state from all across America. They’re totally focused on flipping this Republican State “blue” in 2022. North Carolina delivered for President Trump in 2020. But without your help, this key battleground is at risk of falling to the Left. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | If we don’t stand united against the Left, Big Tech, and the Mainstream Media, we’re going to lose. There’s no doubt. That’s why it’s so important that Grassroots Republicans like you step up to help -- even if it’s only just a small donation. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Nikki Fried
subject: "You're on your own"
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

As COVID cases rose in Florida this week, Florida hospitals begged the state for help.

The response, according to one Jacksonville epidemiologist, was “you’re on your own.”

Here’s the thing: that’s been the message out of Tallahassee for far too long.

When we asked for Medicaid expansion to provide high-quality, affordable healthcare to people across Florida, elected Republicans said no.

When thousands of Floridians couldn’t access unemployment benefits during the pandemic, Governor DeSantis and the legislature did nothing.

And during the deadliest pandemic in American history, DeSantis peddled conspiracy theories instead of governing. Now, our economic recovery—and thousands of lives—are at risk.

Florida’s rigged system has told us we’re on our own for far too long. I’m running to build a state that supports us instead of making us fend for ourselves. If you agree, please click here to support our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-supportive-government-july]

As governor, I’ll never tell those in need that they’re on their own. I’ll do what I’ve done my entire life: step up and help out.

Thank you for your support—not just of our campaign, but of each other during all the challenges we’ve faced over the past year.

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

Peter, Dr. Fauci lied.

The NIH funded research in Wuhan that could have led to viruses like COVID-19.

_We've seen the paper trail. He can't run from reality with distracting language and fake ignorance._

That's what I told Fox News and it needs to be heard by everyone across this country.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029237:68TYHtlIN:m:1:3253819041:3361DEB9669282A6461621B381498F5B:r)
When it comes down to it, we can't count on Dr. Fauci to come clean on his own.

He has a self interest in covering up the whole thing.

**_But I'm not going to let him get away with it. _**

His lies are more than just destructive, they're actually criminal. And he must be held accountable immediately.

I've already urged the Department of Justice to act.

Help me put the pressure on by chipping in now: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2641081/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029237:68TYHtlIN:m:1:3253819041:3361DEB9669282A6461621B381498F5B:r)**

It's time to say enough is enough.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: The DNC media is attacking me... again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
They keep stooping lower. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/dnc-media-attacking?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=37f240fd54&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

The goons at The Washington Post are attacking me again! They hate me because I'm an America First patriot, and I'm a threat to their globalist, far-left allies in Congress and in the White House.

I've become one of their top targets, and I'm fine with that. _I have the right enemies_.

But just when you think they can't stoop lower, they always do.

Take a look at their latest hit piece:

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3d48bcb389&e=645b3b1338)

These pathetic "journalists" have already tried to use my family against me, and now they're harassing my former patients.

By the way, while some of my former patients are liberals who hate my politics, they agreed I was the best dentist they ever had!

They ought to be ashamed and embarrassed, but they're Democrats, so they are shameless.

This barrage of attacks from the far-left, DNC-controlled media have one purpose: _they're meant to take me out_. [That's why I need your support today](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9535c1225e&e=645b3b1338).

[Contribute to my reelection campaign right away, and show The Washington Post that you'll never bend to their propaganda](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4a0d2915ac&e=645b3b1338). They're clearly getting desperate, fellow Patriot.

They know they can't attack me on my America First record, because our America First movement is so popular.

So they resort to these ridiculous cheap shots instead.

But their attacks only invigorate me to fight harder, and I'm counting on your support today. [Please help me continue to battle the radical left in Washington and save America from the globalist takeover by chipping into my reelection today](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=22af36e883&e=645b3b1338). They hate me because I'm an America First patriot, and I'm a threat to their globalist, far-left allies in Congress and in the White House. I've become one of their top targets, and I'm fine with that. I have the right enemies. But just when you think they can't stoop lower, they always do. Take a look at their latest hit piece: These pathetic "journalists" have already tried to use my family against me, and now they're harassing my former patients. By the way, while some of my former patients are liberals who hate my politics, they agreed I was the best dentist they ever had! They ought to be ashamed and embarrassed, but they're Democrats, so they are shameless. This barrage of attacks from the far-left, DNC-controlled media have one purpose: they're meant to take me out. . . They're clearly getting desperate, fellow Patriot. They know they can't attack me on my America First record, because our America First movement is so popular. So they resort to these ridiculous cheap shots instead. name: Ed Hutchison, National Police Association
subject: "Defund the Police" is a DISASTER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Police Association
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1d8f26251db240c0b73ba03afc1b9e3a&_e=DvRXQeNMfIG_-mzeOccZhCmBn0kNaYsBhv7s91z__S7tbDrWOxTEh-KQ0AXbW31loteg1-71B7nUvXIQxYXXnqXat4lgxIavDs5pLSo_yL0-hfYFMasM7tJn8VWfU13YtFMIyZsxUbGYge-B7GUEmHxzde4eFYlSpdTMelNZtz9GE-lzGwswX6ZFP_EoaIEsg5Sx-PT18k0_QgIDARE_O_E-fA_iNv38h6yu5tvRwNYNeDNb9P4ycFghiLxCcmpwYVZQdLY7MFpwgLJBxoJa4zpyuLg1FjW5Hk819-cbyCGC-mIrR-c4F7YrBXLeI51-jHMT3noygoNcsjTK-BHXHZqdZDHrg-1WqceMTcqm8PrjSO8574Re5OwwUOakc62X0xupPvVc6Gu8Tlyp-IfveuPyAkg2QGSHyuuoCYXiZr_y8q8wyeHO_WeThsEoMDBcpm79xCWcdCwhxUhLZotQoBZFJ-zwNPMDjxAwTupvfw0%3D) Friend,
The left-wing anti-cop agenda goes back decades.
But now, over the last couple years, it’s been front and center...
The “woke” mob taking to the streets and the politicians who support their “Defund the Police” nonsense are **BEYOND CLUELESS** and **TRULY DANGEROUS**.
Major cities across America have now cut funding for law enforcement. The criminals have been emboldened, and violent crime is SURGING. Violence against officers on the streets is way up too, _including a 50% year-over-year spike in ambush attacks_.
Here at the National Police Association, we’re leading the charge to **BACK THE BLUE** and expose the “Defund the Police” movement. We need everyone who supports our men and women in uniform to help.

clean_body: Friend, The left-wing anti-cop agenda goes back decades. But now, over the last couple years, it’s been front and center... The “woke” mob taking to the streets and the politicians who support their “Defund the Police” nonsense are BEYOND CLUELESS and TRULY DANGEROUS. Major cities across America have now cut funding for law enforcement. The criminals have been emboldened, and violent crime is SURGING. Violence against officers on the streets is way up too, including a 50% year-over-year spike in ambush attacks. Here at the National Police Association, we’re leading the charge to BACK THE BLUE and expose the “Defund the Police” movement. We need everyone who supports our men and women in uniform to help. For months, Joe Biden has refused to condemn these Democrat-run cities that have cut funding for police departments – he is a coward who doesn’t want to cross the “woke” mob. That list of cities is long and growing, including Austin, Atlanta, Baltimore, Los Angeles, Minneapolis, Portland, Seattle, and many others. New York City alone has slashed its police budget by $1 BILLION! Between these “Defund the Police” budget cuts and the out-of-control violence we’re seeing on the streets, it’s no wonder that officers are retiring in record numbers. Our communities are at risk, Friend. We’re counting on everyday folks who Back the Blue to step up and join our fight. Our work includes public outreach to get out our message, supporting officers in legal cases, and offering rewards to bring criminals who target police officers to justice and get them off our streets. Support our men and women out there working hard to protect and serve. Help us send a message to the pro-police politicians out there that the American people have their backs. Sincerely, Ed Hutchison, President & CEO National Police Association | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by the National Police Association “

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Patriot, Big Tech is coming for you
body:
I’ll get straight to the point. You know I’m filing a crucial lawsuit against the Big Tech mafia.

| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YWJJE4oo763qIdalhR24DGsg/JxEbkBadM9SEMU7bWogtww) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YWJJE4oo763qIdalhR24DGsg/JxEbkBadM9SEMU7bWogtww) I’ll get straight to the point.

You know I’m filing a crucial lawsuit against the Big Tech mafia.

**Because they’re deliberately silencing patriots like you and me. And trying to control election outcomes so you and I lose our voices in Washington, D.C.**

But my lawsuit just became more urgent than ever.

[**And it’s why I am asking for your support to cover the growing amount of legal expenses to get this filed.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YWJJE4oo763qIdalhR24DGsg/JxEbkBadM9SEMU7bWogtww)

**The Democrat National Committee and other allies of the Biden administration are making moves right now to censor your private texts to your family and friends.**

Maybe you saw Tucker Carlson talk about this on Fox News. Quoting from a Politico article, he said:

"Biden allied groups, including the Democrat National Committee, are planning to engage fact-checkers more aggressively, and work with SMS carriers to dispel misinformation about vaccines that is sent over social media and text messages."
Patriot, that’s terrifying!

You and I know they won’t just stop with muzzling messages about Covid vaccines.

**Big Tech is pulling out all the stops to become Big Brother!**

You and I can’t let that happen.

That’s why I’ve retained one of the most experienced lawyers in America who has taken on organized crime and stood up to power.

My case is moving forward...and the bills are mounting up.

I’m not a rich woman. And I don’t have billionaire donors to lean on.

This is a grassroots fight for our country, so I rely on concerned patriots like you.

[**Patriot, please help me fight Big Tech tyranny with your critical gift of $25, $50, $100, or more now.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YWJJE4oo763qIdalhR24DGsg/JxEbkBadM9SEMU7bWogtww)

[**Your vital gift of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford is the only means I have to fully fund our fight for free speech and our future.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YWJJE4oo763qIdalhR24DGsg/JxEbkBadM9SEMU7bWogtww)

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

subject: Not one to back away from a challenge
body:

Friends —

I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a

explain why.

As you know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California

anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.

But what you might not know is that these same Trump devotees also want to
eliminate our Senate majority by defeating my good friend, Alex Padilla.

Now I’ve known Alex for a while. He isn’t one to back away from a
challenge, but he can’t win a race as big and important as this by
himself. It’s going to take a big team.

I told Alex he could count on us to get 1,000 people to chip in today to
help fuel his grassroots campaign so he can be prepared for the negative

$3
contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate in California? We

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Gain of Fauci
body:
We’ve known for some time about the devastating consequences of Fauci’s lockdown policies: jobs lost, businesses shuttered, schools closed and lives destroyed.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zejJam_i7lcZZLoBwb9n6ko-30DMPFaC49l5B7YG6qLBiYhMhTy6E_yuVHGeTkEwBYRpdlTwn6nQWYZ-nEok2SkaMoQjRNf9ecb5xOKwB6Nd1XrzID3HTCJZvT_FlOfUnMgMtxPGd0Aa6sEoKE7Oxw==&c=d0oT_a9HKommEDpsF146OvP0SwbSpWlvQRBPMijljZyxGr9H-RKeRg==&ch=AQFh1BzWx0FtsKpDGpzm_znwI3igqNQJwh0wjTwc2gy40bsUWM54Ew==)

| Peter,
We've known for some time about the devastating consequences of Fauci's lockdown policies: jobs lost, businesses shuttered, schools closed and lives destroyed.
We've also known for some time that the most likely explanation for the start of the pandemic is that the COVID-19 virus escaped from the Wuhan Institute of Virology in Wuhan, China.
We've suspected for some time that Fauci and his bureaucratic brethren may have been involved in funding the Wuhan lab's work to experiment on viruses in ways that made them more deadly to human beings.
In fact, this past week we saw Senator Rand Paul, one of the rare members of Congress who actually holds Fauci accountable, expose Fauci for his false statements about the funding of the Wuhan lab. Fauci got agitated because he doesn't want us to know his role in funding reckless, ethically dubious research that may have precipitated a global pandemic.
Fauci needs to be fired and an investigation into his role in funding the Wuhan lab must be launched immediately.
The corporate media is Fauci's Praetorian Guard, and they are attacking me because I've been willing to hold Fauci accountable.
Please stand with me so I can fight back against the media's lies and Fauci-inspired attacks! [Chip in $30, $15, or just $5 to help me continue my fight >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zejJam_i7lcZZLoBwb9n6ko-30DMPFaC49l5B7YG6qLBiYhMhTy6E_G08KRdzl5QREd7j9nwNSdvF3NrrbAUSVA1308Puil5bk8GUgasWnOKCcetuPeaA9vs2DUnSKV0XJwytghLPKKyV5_P_ClRYSBk7gQItMj7J6dwwJV5Ot20HHaJ7dDlVbxwbLe3lTwZ&c=d0oT_a9HKommEDpsF146OvP0SwbSpWlvQRBPMijljZyxGr9H-RKeRg==&ch=AQFh1BzWx0FtsKpDGpzm_znwI3igqNQJwh0wjTwc2gy40bsUWM54Ew==)
Sincerely, Ron DeSantis

clean_body: We’ve known for some time about the devastating consequences of Fauci’s lockdown policies: jobs lost, businesses shuttered, schools closed and lives destroyed. | | | | == | Peter, We've known for some time about the devastating consequences of Fauci's lockdown policies: jobs lost, businesses shuttered, schools closed and lives destroyed. We've also known for some time that the most likely explanation for the start of the pandemic is that the COVID-19 virus escaped from the Wuhan Institute of Virology in Wuhan, China. We've suspected for some time that Fauci and his bureaucratic brethren may have been involved in funding the Wuhan lab's work to experiment on viruses in ways that made them more deadly to human beings. In fact, this past week we saw Senator Rand Paul, one of the rare members of Congress who actually holds Fauci accountable, expose Fauci for his false statements about the funding of the Wuhan lab. Fauci got agitated because he doesn't want us to know his role in funding reckless, ethically dubious research that may have precipitated a global pandemic. Fauci needs to be fired and an investigation into his role in funding the Wuhan lab must be launched immediately. The corporate media is Fauci's Praetorian Guard, and they are attacking me because I've been willing to hold Fauci accountable. Please stand with me so I can fight back against the media's lies and Fauci-inspired attacks! == Sincerely, Ron DeSantis | | == | VISIT US AT == | == == == | Sponsored by Friends of Ron DeSantis. | | | | | | | | Friends of Ron DeSantis | 610 S. This election isn’t just about the candidates running to represent you. All the progress we’ve made over the last few years is also on the ballot. Democrats in Virginia have been an example for the rest of the country: flipping Congressional districts Republicans have held for decades, winning statewide elections by record margins, taking the General Assembly, and passing landmark legislation on a number of issues.

But that progress could be undone in November if we don’t elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That’s why I’m asking for your support -- not just for me, but for the Democratic Party of Virginia as well. **[Will you make a split donation right now and join me in supporting DPVA?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33136969/297956385/-843151834?refcode=ris_20210728_e_f_us_na_na_eom4nd&refcode2=rti&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWE4MmNjYS1kZmVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMNy7yCfEIBpWbXNWo4tujobwgYY2PKuFyUNJyNH4Gc=)**

Thank you for all of your support. |

name: January 6 Investigation (via WDTO)
subject: McCarthy won’t last
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Nancy Pelosi isn't fazed by Kevin McCarthy's desperate new attack on her and the House select committee investigating the January 6 insurrection. At a recent press conference, McCarthy absurdly blamed Pelosi for allowing the riot to reach the Capitol. McCarthy said that “leadership at the top failed” that day. When he was asked if GOP leader Mitch McConnell shares any of that blame, McCarthy of course had no response. **But Nancy Pelosi has the facts straight, Peter:** **“Now that the bipartisan Select Committee is beginning its work, the only tools left in House Republicans' arsenal are deflection, distortion, and disinformation.” \-- Nancy Pelosi** | **[SUPPORT OUR INVESTIGATORS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33137669/297958670/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210728_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5MjEyYTkzLWUyZWYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j4kbi0PLf_taWjaoB-vcsFD_0Rprii5TI3HGHXqR2WU=)**
---

Peter, our Democrat investigators need your help. Nancy Pelosi had absolutely no role in the violence at the Capitol on January 6, and it is ridiculous and dangerous to claim that she did. Peter, We’re coming up on one of the last big fundraising pushes before the Recall Election in September, and it’s critical that we hit our goal. **We’re still $7,500 away from hitting our July deadline — can you please chip in what you can before MIDNIGHT on Saturday to help?** [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5f8ed7bfe4854f07/266711dac0f23fb3c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5f8ed7bfe4854f07/ac4ca9452b5d54f3c3d6b838967d376c/34943) We can’t waste a single moment in the fight to defeat Gavin Newsom and save our beautiful state. I'll be blunt: **With each passing day, it becomes clearer that Republicans are unfit to govern.**

\-- They pushed our democracy to the brink with their lies about the 2O2O election.
\-- They have attacked our voting rights for their own political benefit.
\-- And now, they're demanding complete loyalty to Donald Trump and his destructive politics as they fight to defeat our Majority.

It's sickening.

But I'm more fired up than ever before to defend my House Democrats and safeguard our progress.

And with the GOP's playing dirty, I know it's going to take everything we've got to protect our Majority.

**That 's why I've set an ambitious $225,OOO End of Month goal for my House Democrats -- and I'm counting on your help to meet it before time runs out in just 72 hours to protect our House Democrats.**

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. clean_body: | | | I'll be blunt: With each passing day, it becomes clearer that Republicans are unfit to govern. \-- They pushed our democracy to the brink with their lies about the 2O2O election. \-- They have attacked our voting rights for their own political benefit. \-- And now, they're demanding complete loyalty to Donald Trump and his destructive politics as they fight to defeat our Majority. It's sickening. But I'm more fired up than ever before to defend my House Democrats and safeguard our progress. And with the GOP's playing dirty, I know it's going to take everything we've got to protect our Majority. That 's why I've set an ambitious $225,OOO End of Month goal for my House Democrats -- and I'm counting on your help to meet it before time runs out in just 72 hours to protect our House Democrats. So please, can you rush in $3, $10, $25 -- or whatever you can afford -- to help me crush my End of Month goal and defend our House Majority? | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33140232/297966667/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYzZWY3Yi1lYWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js55uOwpfKep9q5yKm2d40pYOYim-QMxG2c4F2APiPc=&emci=f6d08e96-e7ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=51f3ef7b-eaef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend Fair Fight Action’s [Hot Call Summer campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33140233/297966669/401685288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYzZWY3Yi1lYWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js55uOwpfKep9q5yKm2d40pYOYim-QMxG2c4F2APiPc=&emci=f6d08e96-e7ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=51f3ef7b-eaef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) is fully underway! Thanks to the tireless efforts of advocates like you, so far we’ve driven **more than 50,000 calls** to U.S. Senators in support of the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. This week, we’re turning the heat up on Congress to **demand they set national standards to ensure fair districts and put an end to partisan gerrymandering.** Voters are doing their jobs by turning out to vote, and it’s up to Congress to do theirs by ensuring that voters can make their voices heard. See more below! **Please join us Thursday, July 29 at 8pm ET for a conversation between Fair Fight Action Founder Stacey Abrams and award-winning actress, producer, and change agent Yara Shahidi. Tune in via[YouTube](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33140234/297966670/-721896082?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYzZWY3Yi1lYWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js55uOwpfKep9q5yKm2d40pYOYim-QMxG2c4F2APiPc=&emci=f6d08e96-e7ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=51f3ef7b-eaef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33140235/297966671/-2136709347?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYzZWY3Yi1lYWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js55uOwpfKep9q5yKm2d40pYOYim-QMxG2c4F2APiPc=&emci=f6d08e96-e7ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=51f3ef7b-eaef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), or [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33140236/297966672/-387685422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYzZWY3Yi1lYWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js55uOwpfKep9q5yKm2d40pYOYim-QMxG2c4F2APiPc=&emci=f6d08e96-e7ef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=51f3ef7b-eaef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277).** In addition to joining us for Thursday’s event, be sure that you’re calling your Senators every day at 888-453-3211 to demand they take urgent action to protect the freedom to vote. Below are some key points to emphasize when calling your Senators about the For The People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. **_What to Say To Your Senators_** _It is imperative that Congress pass the**For the People Act** and the **John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** before state legislatures begin special sessions on the once-in-a-decade redistricting process, which could happen as soon as September. We need urgent federal action to ensure fair districts and put an end to partisan gerrymandering._ Want some more information? Feel free to share the following with your Senators: _We must pass both the**For the People Ac** t to ban anti-voter partisan gerrymandering and the **John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** to ensure jurisdictions don’t find new insidious ways to redraw districts to silence the voices of voters of color. _ Keep reading for more information to share! **The Supreme Court’s 2019 refusal to restrict partisan gerrymandering has given license to state legislatures to redraw legislative districts in antidemocratic ways that allow politicians to pick their voters and silence the voices of voters of color**.
* Our country does better when our legislators look like their voters, and when voters can hold their leaders to account. That’s why we need the **For the People Act** to ban partisan gerrymandering and the **John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** to ensure jurisdictions don’t find new ways to redraw districts to dilute the voices of voters of color.

We’ll be back next week with more ways to turn up the heat! **And remember to tune in TOMORROW, July 29 at 8pm ET on YouTube, Facebook, or Twitter for a conversation with Stacey Abrams and Yara Shahidi.** Thank you for your support and activism, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|

name: John Fetterman
subject: Damn important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re exactly $102,769 away from meeting our July end-of-month fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210728-2105-header&t=1&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)
Hey, it’s John Fetterman. I’m reaching out today with something kinda urgent + important that I’m hoping you can help with, Peter.
So I just checked ActBlue, and it looks like we’re *exactly* $102,769 away from meeting our July end-of-month fundraising goal.
**That means we’ve only got _< checks notes>_ four days to close the gap in our fundraising. 😬**
According to the records I have on file, you haven’t donated to our campaign yet this month. So today on behalf of me, Gisele, and our entire campaign team, I am humbly and respectfully asking:
[**_Will you please make your very first donation of $5 to our campaign today? Your donation will have a direct and immediate impact on reaching our $102,769 July fundraising goal._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25033?refcode=em20210728-2105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)
__[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25033?refcode=em20210728-2105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25033?refcode=em20210728-2105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)**
Look, reaching $102,769 is damn important, especially now that our campaign is growing like never before. As you might have heard, we’re opening our very first office in Pittsburgh at the end of the summer.
But that’s *only* the beginning. **Raising the outstanding $102,769 in our budget means I can actually greenlight more urgent and necessary campaign expenses** , large and small, including:
* Organizers to reach all 67 Pennsylvania counties
* Pittsburgh office utilities (water, gas, electric)
* Color copier/printer for office (and ink)
* More campaign literature (door hangers + palm cards)
* Gas for our campaign van
* Snacks for volunteers
* Canvassing supplies (clipboards, pens, stickers)
* Additional office space across our big, beautiful Commonwealth

[**_Peter, will you please donate your first donation of $5 to help our campaign reach $102,769 by midnight on July 31? Only when our outstanding balance is gone and our July fundraising goal is met can we resume growing our campaign operations._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25033?refcode=em20210728-2105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25033?refcode=em20210728-2105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)**
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU for all your support thus far. I know our team absolutely has what it takes to close this fundraising gap and end July strong. 🙏
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I mean it when I say that every contribution makes an impact, Peter. For example, a modest gift of $10 could cover a few clipboards, while something bigger like $150 could get us like a third of the way towards an office printer. [**_Could you please send your first $5 our way to help close the gap on our $102,769 goal?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25033?refcode=em20210728-2105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=43&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210728-2105-footer&t=44&refcode2=2105_434096_OsHab5&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=45&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=46&akid=2105%2E434096%2EOsHab5)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Can you chip in $3 to help fuel our campaign to keep Mark in the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends - we have three very important pieces of information to share with you.
1\. Another Republican entered the race to run against Mark in 2022, this one backed by a California billionaire — that brings us to FOUR opponents total now.
2\. Then on top of that, this month CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
3\. So now we need your help! Our goal in July is to get 40,000 donations to help fuel this campaign to keep Mark in the Senate.
And it’s going to be crucial we hit this goal, because with the Senate again up for grabs, this is already a multimillion-dollar race.
**We still have some time left to dig deep and knock this goal out of the park. So with our deadline approaching, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We can’t afford to fall short of our 40,000 contribution goal, not when we are being targeted by Mitch McConnell and his allies.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210728-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210728-1-15&t=14&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)**

****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210728-1-15&t=15&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210728-1-15&t=16&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210728-1-15&t=17&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210728-1-15&t=18&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210728-1-15&t=19&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)**
---
****
It’s important that we hit this goal, especially now that outside groups, including one backed by Mitch McConnell are ramping up their spending.
Your contribution is so important to our ability to defend this seat. So if you are able, please consider making a donation today.
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/July-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210728-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1036_6688874_qMBO6g&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g)
Thanks for all of your support,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=21&akid=1036%2E6688874%2EqMBO6g).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Friends - we have three very important pieces of information to share with you. 1\. Another Republican entered the race to run against Mark in 2022, this one backed by a California billionaire — that brings us to FOUR opponents total now. 2\. Then on top of that, this month CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. 3\. So now we need your help! Our goal in July is to get 40,000 donations to help fuel this campaign to keep Mark in the Senate. And it’s going to be crucial we hit this goal, because with the Senate again up for grabs, this is already a multimillion-dollar race. We still have some time left to dig deep and knock this goal out of the park. So with our deadline approaching, we have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** It’s important that we hit this goal, especially now that outside groups, including one backed by Mitch McConnell are ramping up their spending. Your contribution is so important to our ability to defend this seat. So if you are able, please consider making a donation today. Thanks for all of your support, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

| | Peter, Mitch McConnell is not happy that maverick Senate Rules Committee chairwoman Amy Klobuchar put the spotlight on the GOP's voter suppression efforts in Georgia last week. **“This silly stunt is based on the same lie as all the Democrats' phony hysteria from Georgia to Texas to Washington, D.C.” \-- Mitch McConnell** McConnell told every Republican on the Rules Committee to stay home from last week's field hearing in Atlanta. The shameless GOP is convinced that their authoritarian game plan will go off without a hitch. McConnell knows that Republican candidates perform best when voter turnout is low. Left unchecked, the GOP will limit voting access in diverse communities like Atlanta that came out strong for Joe Biden and flipped both of Georgia's Senate seats blue. But Amy Klobuchar has a message for our “friends” on the right: **“If you just stay in Washington and get doused down and gridlocked out by our archaic procedures in the Senate, you lose sight of what you are fighting for.” \-- Amy Klobuchar** | **[PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33142992/297975190/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210728_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyODlmMDU4LWYzZWYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rpkcjDgsL3CQZkkIV8uLzAfeT2cXaT0ZEvjxgzKXyGA=)**

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029318:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029317:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029319:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029320:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029321:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029322:6j41atlNa:m:1:3253819041:55634360858E3E6228FB014571BD1CCC:r)

As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-42467433600-echo7-786ECD985538D50746EBB841BF3FB776@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Team Wild
subject: President Biden’s visit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Folks are realizing just how important this district is.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33143343/297976181/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210728-ne-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWY4NmIwMS1mNWVmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OuiI5pYVXb5dXtZAjaLlDDMHatu8gppEvWjqtbGFfQ=)
---
| Peter,

Today, President Biden is visiting a manufacturing facility in our district as part of his “Buy American” initiative. We’re so excited to have President Biden here in the Lehigh Valley — and we anticipate many more high-profile visits in the coming months, because **folks are realizing just how important this district is.**

We’re in one of the most competitive House races in the country and we’re just days away from our first deadline since yet another Republican competitor joined Susan’s race. | Peter,

Four Republicans have filed paperwork to run against Abigail and another four are rumored to be joining the race in the coming months!

As Abigail's finance director, let me tell you that **more candidates mean more people misrepresenting, distorting or even just lying about Abigail 's record.**

More misrepresentations, distortions and lies mean we will need more resources to ensure that Abigail can communicate across our ten counties who she is, what she has done for the district, and what she is doing for the district!

🚩The CDC and Democrats are bringing back mask mandates. We need to know what you think. | | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=861d49baf9&e=1050d051da)

| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner and Republicans in Congress are fighting for us, and _**we want to hear from you.**_

**Do you believe vaccinated Americans should be forced by the government to wear masks?[Answer Now!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8c6acfcd58&e=1050d051da)**

| We've spent the past year being forced by Democrats to wear masks. Now, the CDC has put out new guidance for vaccinated Americans to wear masks indoors.

And Nancy Pelosi is already forcing Republicans to wear masks on the House Floor, or they'll be fined. **This is out of control!**

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

Jake LaTurner and Republicans in Congress are fighting for us, and we want to hear from you. Do you believe vaccinated Americans should be forced by the government to wear masks? | | We've spent the past year being forced by Democrats to wear masks. Now, the CDC has put out new guidance for vaccinated Americans to wear masks indoors. And Nancy Pelosi is already forcing Republicans to wear masks on the House Floor, or they'll be fined. This is out of control! | The information you provide is critical in the fight against the far-left policies that threaten our way of life. Yours in the fight, Team LaTurner | | "Take The Mask Survey" | "Donate Now to Help us FIGHT BACK" | | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © |2019| |LaTurner for Congress|, All rights reserved.

* Prices, from gas to groceries, have skyrocketed.
* A record number of illegal immigrants are flooding our Southern border due to Biden’s open door policies

**We can’t allow this to stand, Fellow Conservative. Peter, Dr. Fauci lied.

The NIH funded research in Wuhan that could have led to viruses like COVID-19.

_We've seen the paper trail. He can't run from reality with distracting language and fake ignorance._

That's what I told Fox News and it needs to be heard by everyone across this country.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029866:60ToPtl0N:m:1:3253819041:181642FDC37B8B98F1790BC498F4AE6D:r)
When it comes down to it, we can't count on Dr. Fauci to come clean on his own.

He has a self interest in covering up the whole thing.

**_But I'm not going to let him get away with it. _**

His lies are more than just destructive, they're actually criminal. And he must be held accountable immediately.

I've already urged the Department of Justice to act.

Help me put the pressure on by chipping in now: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2641081/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58029866:60ToPtl0N:m:1:3253819041:181642FDC37B8B98F1790BC498F4AE6D:r)**

It's time to say enough is enough.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. clean_body: Kansas has a long legacy of outstanding conservative leadership... From Bob Dole and Pat Roberts, to many excellent GOP leaders serving our state to t Friend, Kansas has a long legacy of outstanding conservative leadership... From Bob Dole and Pat Roberts, to many excellent GOP leaders serving our state to this day, we’re very lucky. And I am humbled to have so many of them join my campaign. Kansas icons Bob Dole and Pat Roberts, Legislative leaders like House Speaker Ron Ryckman and Senate Vice President Rick Wilborn, former Kansas RNC National Committeewoman Helen Van Etten, former President of Kansas Farm Bureau Steve Baccus, Johnson County Sheriff Calvin Hayden... and more! While I am humbled to have their support, what matters most to me is the support of Kansans like YOU, which is why I’m asking you to join the list of incredible Republicans who support me, friend. I can’t express how grateful I am to receive these endorsements. As someone who has looked up to some of these conservative leaders my whole life and who has worked closely with the others in my time in public service, I couldn’t be more proud or humbled to earn their faith and support. Will you stand with these strong Republicans and support me, friend? I want to see YOUR name come across my list of donors who have made their support official by chipping in. Thank you, Derek Schmidt Republican for Governor of Kansas | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Fellow American,

Voters in Missouri are really starting to take notice about my Senate candidacy.

From the day I announced my candidacy in May to today we’ve seen our support grow by leaps and bounds, and finally even the political class is taking notice.

And it’s because I’m not a novice. I’ve been around the block once or twice – I’ve lived a full life and I know what Washington needs – and it’s certainly not another career politician in the United States Senate. People in Missouri – and all across America – over the last several years have shown there is an appetite for ordinary Americans performing the duties of public servants, not career bureaucrats.

I’m certainly not a Washington insider – anyone who knows me can vouch for that. And my fundraising number can back up that assertion: **I’ve taken no money from corporate PACS**.

I’ve been hustling around the state – doing 6, 8 events daily and accepting small dollar donations when people can spare a few bucks.

Today, we’re 72 hours away from our July fundraising deadline, and **[I’m asking you if you can spare a few bucks](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=3903f0e33e1441d7a96fda965ab0737c&_e=p36Ggg62ywcj0_eWJMggxe7OT8DCtsprVT0cRPkHp0FCBlhxxCudhpAT8busRH433dJ10BQyp4PmjPGhViieSNW-gwm49nVV2Fp_lbtxnSnjcvvUejzusXiveVkfGAgeYhSKKe40xMcSI-4F4S59fu8klW9mySsUlbBbauYkQ9Nr5HOblThLaIye20wtEwS_9M6StPLk8Eh18H3VXpG_d5o7-tnWl7oLCI_Mzj7GsqgkMFQSosq31QafzumlBsdGwWGBCai2uofbywVxiV6SpfdZTCQ2Q-iCiEjmOkdNmUfanYzpXxhvou1A_h8lC57Olw-pPzL9_oTZVlpv3RNHP5PRfhbHa3Vk5Fir7n5ApCKAg-hBneshHTdlko5s5Q95ZYgaDLJYHdco51UX9dJRBIU9ucWOWwqrBg5DLAJcKulC27zheUeTmO-gm_iEVcYyBLa0uzYVkt9VZ8FeZKwccw%3D%3D)**. I know I’ve said this before, but I’ll say it again right now: the path to the Senate majority runs through Missouri – and I am one of the only Republicans running who can hold this seat for our party.

[** CLICK HERE TO HELP TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=3903f0e33e1441d7a96fda965ab0737c&_e=p36Ggg62ywcj0_eWJMggxe7OT8DCtsprVT0cRPkHp0FCBlhxxCudhpAT8busRH433dJ10BQyp4PmjPGhViieSNW-gwm49nVV2Fp_lbtxnSnjcvvUejzusXiveVkfGAgeYhSKKe40xMcSI-4F4S59fu8klW9mySsUlbBbauYkQ9Nr5HOblThLaIye20wtEwS_9M6StPLk8Eh18H3VXpG_d5o7-tnWl7oLCI_Mzj7GsqgkMFQSosq31QafzumlBsdGWECho0f8OwDkf0m6hAx15D05VyfhLTeJwaCpuH1GxDHP14aTgq-2nSLLNIyE1Sdd5RRAjhYla-SeCEZaL7Sm42EHxaqQxgoVW_S0pGeR5R7dKMJ36yAsh5awuFtfzwkAgf0dJ-ees937U208KmCCwWHZ7WwKpUr90AecQXJfmQ2j7jsSGi77Qubx4nIUxyCcgPxGSt6AfqJST1Gf1i9_PQ%3D%3D)
This campaign is something totally different than Missouri and the United States has seen before. I felt a calling, I am stepping up, and I’m ready to serve you.

I didn’t abandon my home when the mob came to burn it down. Just like I won’t abandon you as the socialists attempt to take over our country. I’ll fight like hell to keep this country great

I’ve spent 37 years defending the defenseless as a criminal defense attorney. Black white or otherwise. So, when my opponents say that I have no business running for office, I kindly disagree.

**[Do your homework. Check me out. Read about me and my story, and if you find yourself able to make a gift to my campaign, I’d like to thank you in advance.](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=3903f0e33e1441d7a96fda965ab0737c&_e=p36Ggg62ywcj0_eWJMggxe7OT8DCtsprVT0cRPkHp0FCBlhxxCudhpAT8busRH433dJ10BQyp4PmjPGhViieSNW-gwm49nVV2Fp_lbtxnSnjcvvUejzusXiveVkfGAgeYhSKKe40xMcSI-4F4S59fu8klW9mySsUlbBbauYkQ9Nr5HOblThLaIye20wtEwS_9M6StPLk8Eh18H3VXpG_d5o7-tnWl7oLCI_Mzj7GsqgkMFQSosq31QafzumlBsdG7gG-eEA4kZ2Q0baEmbE9MvnaAjK6U8137pW0akq_sw0pv2cr4RPVGEFQ0BZAva5ZgD0PC9nf7WXyrC3YcA5RR1kOre1sKwIlgDjUuN6EG1CfnDe8vfmqvIt8UbqqE5H7xTfpT2TJazxF8fL7KLXCXtLv6tVR3o0S1T1D_G4ONv9HWwFnPkn4yZQMBdk8scJ4oYiUGhJHR-KUOwNLnAWwNA%3D%3D)**

Mark McCloskey

clean_body: President Biden believes that “global warming” is the #1 threat to the military. What do you think? Friend, In a recent visit with military service members, President Biden declared what he believes is the number one threat to America’s military preparedness. China?Nope. Russia? Nope. Iran? Nope. President Biden chose global warming. Our leaders must be honest about the most pressing threats facing this country. Communist China is doing everything in its power to undermine our political, economic, and national security. Russian state-sponsored hackers are exposing our cyber-weaknesses left and right. And in the Middle East, the Iranian regime is rapidly developing its dangerous nuclear program. Thank you, Gallagher Survey Team | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. Peter,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0df6cc4f796b4d0288e78d40e18d0784&_e=ifKb0ZxhtxmV3CijV0mbr5GgX8APy_oN0znsEJJopjlskZxKdUwIFCHQsEga1Rb6SKkhJlc3RHOejPFJ_G_pqe-AFPKWs7YoIq1QoL2qnn_h4h19t9iUbRVZMmifTj0tXmIvCuPx9DM_y1BawtGLgkw6O0eqcBJKa8zt3a2q4ppCCqRqYGfaUYuuZ-_1qtVWGO7wV4RGsm57WsmX7MmsK6dfLYsUD3MjkiPmC9jC2tFhEO5UHbKJ8Rv1bRhWnc7XL41PF_2ptCjVrYSBT3F3ZloVb76utJwfiJ182Ovz0Hb1lLjT3dfComFWtYRfDJYdlwVl35Slh__D94xGNNF6BR6QFCxaD8JQJIjuM1Bs3EjjIKhq_RLWAonTHlBpxiI_M-D63dSvVbYUBanSWh9IZIe8W9V-wB6T2Kys40K7BHRSyd5sQXoeLg3WuDkrW_a8pJvVhgTIAz9ylcnneEo6iVe7AtU4Bf5pIZMbsLVwbHg%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Peter, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0df6cc4f796b4d0288e78d40e18d0784&_e=ifKb0ZxhtxmV3CijV0mbr5GgX8APy_oN0znsEJJopjlskZxKdUwIFCHQsEga1Rb6SKkhJlc3RHOejPFJ_G_pqe-AFPKWs7YoIq1QoL2qnn_h4h19t9iUbRVZMmifTj0tXmIvCuPx9DM_y1BawtGLgkw6O0eqcBJKa8zt3a2q4ppCCqRqYGfaUYuuZ-_1qtVWGO7wV4RGsm57WsmX7MmsK6dfLYsUD3MjkiPmC9jC2tFhEO5UHbKJ8Rv1bRhWnc7XL41PF_2ptCjVrYSBT3F3ZiR4hasfbtek6vBbqDpaLDyiXwwENFtakSsof9QESlZbL3Mbu0k0vrRLC5Y8DMwfANL4TvTRLZnH2oD7fWZoV8-Tj-YWg6AjuEBbX2CYQw6HSdllxKddhTdFGU_MIqkRzzb4j2zWvu4DmG20KmTDWofl2cyoTdoRDEYr7N0BQEbiz-gHPxECl0NDImAU4dyXSapKwHZ6nk1kCvAwiEOMqwA%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

**[Peter, I have taken on tougher battles than this in the courtroom and that’s how I know I am going to need every grassroots conservative across the nation with me to flip this critical House seat.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0df6cc4f796b4d0288e78d40e18d0784&_e=ifKb0ZxhtxmV3CijV0mbr5GgX8APy_oN0znsEJJopjlskZxKdUwIFCHQsEga1Rb6SKkhJlc3RHOejPFJ_G_pqe-AFPKWs7YoIq1QoL2qnn_h4h19t9iUbRVZMmifTj0tXmIvCuPx9DM_y1BawtGLgkw6O0eqcBJKa8zt3a2q4ppCCqRqYGfaUYuuZ-_1qtVWGO7wV4RGsm57WsmX7MmsK6dfLYsUD3MjkiPmC9jC2tFhEO5UHbKJ8Rv1bRhWnc7XL41PF_2ptCjVrYSBT3F3ZpFoJvF4DZsZCGI0HV1CNKmb3s78xoFOKE9jGnG_HzHDujSRjDGPCDiRccmM9ExCS7GhgryIHiXlm-DFpopOjuzIu7y4J4phtYIJ_BCAO2wKhVQWtf-DBTXobm0co_b3gdxnhzgJTjGQkKH47naklcO5WQ4J6gicwEEn4-UfVXnRm98uMs2dOc54BDqca33RwV5rsL07jntioaqwtzei-z8%3D)**

**[I know you don’t know me but take a moment to look up my district. clean_body: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | Peter, Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career. With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases. I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late. Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) P.S. If you’re a proud Republican woman, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. subject: I'm Running Against Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3d772c4548134be1a355a6050f972906&_e=tNZ4PnyIn5gL8aCweBwG8ox0aYP2h3m7Ej-aJ6Eytto7zVogPo2xwMy2_7J4BlPi8P869eeiM-bfxbLz08WUazqjU-WEHeu0t1ppdXQTUJdfUozUQQAdD1hFHKFNlaadMIddeg3g8k4QrnuEmZ33Cd8ZP4bow6eeM_QkzuAruiou6TrXqeHFMzU12KU5IejyEOpKiNsG1vwgDjwL83oQAlItb03Cqj2I9IM8hyaBH_NhHA1HGKlMBgE2OzqVgD2iFBfbzhoBx-fbis3gxd7Se611p-gT-2hTlek0EX7oB8S1ubm4-zYkdjKgHb7sVeS5wPICYU5TRs6aXlbrJwgA1k78QPQhWSIQc-DZrFuVW-MFaxTRhZUt5IlPXSJXZ7xlRgsEonxyWHu1nfg3-gLvqg%3D%3D)

---

Fellow American,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3d772c4548134be1a355a6050f972906&_e=tNZ4PnyIn5gL8aCweBwG8ox0aYP2h3m7Ej-aJ6Eytto7zVogPo2xwMy2_7J4BlPi8P869eeiM-bfxbLz08WUazqjU-WEHeu0t1ppdXQTUJdfUozUQQAdD1hFHKFNlaadMIddeg3g8k4QrnuEmZ33Cd8ZP4bow6eeM_QkzuAruioof1cOGE55JfIInzv-9RKh0rRTN0WsYs2MZi5LsTMV5HuiAOU8jIg8kk0eqduS4bKlIY1LxTYlIpKky1WcNfBu9XczfT6hzTJWuwPzo43wrwAbPDzjd1o2qsuZbsOvON34jyywN9AYBCkj3mWZEkxkTndLxmwGDKVu4vYLGnBjcYb94KKrP065sqWCNMsU_6jID0VaNPcgh6E1wlQ1lVT_0L_lakCsaSQUzXEx0dzpHg%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3d772c4548134be1a355a6050f972906&_e=tNZ4PnyIn5gL8aCweBwG8ox0aYP2h3m7Ej-aJ6Eytto7zVogPo2xwMy2_7J4BlPi8P869eeiM-bfxbLz08WUazqjU-WEHeu0t1ppdXQTUJdfUozUQQAdD1hFHKFNlaadMIddeg3g8k4QrnuEmZ33Cd8ZP4bow6eeM_QkzuAruirciw9KLBEbwl5iSPTArVXhk-aOFynDiyB6QKP0YsfDRUxDId8cOxw0l2hZXE5mFzo8KxpTpAK6515tA99zBc4QHQmn-zawK80_wWwflidiWO4z-_iLPTH0qQ2DlDbRNKZdnsctxBeUo4F0QoOt5z-WWOSq_0b1hV4n-6ZzfGifs_Flt4aDDMD3Wzf9Xsk1aULATkxcs1dhGItJGHljAg1yqDzVlXOD0MGMLwhd2FBBdA%3D%3D)

[**Fellow American, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3d772c4548134be1a355a6050f972906&_e=tNZ4PnyIn5gL8aCweBwG8ox0aYP2h3m7Ej-aJ6Eytto7zVogPo2xwMy2_7J4BlPi8P869eeiM-bfxbLz08WUazqjU-WEHeu0t1ppdXQTUJdfUozUQQAdD1hFHKFNlaadMIddeg3g8k4QrnuEmZ33Cd8ZP4bow6eeM_QkzuAruiq8rm6YvpMSWM_p5l4XKjNMXbUqOdtW3lnuM3O01VoKv9G39-44eFo34siSkARL0nNFB04cp7fgrgKUwvD1zKU7PGEzTtS8NjUoDQY0UZuA2WnKfHKa0IYYrpIx-nk_AJTxyJsbOHaoevTZruWuN8tk-UqUJ5B8wnnJeqFA0_73bHsqV5qsk9KmcZdw4gyHx8jYkEth0hnIDUnIW-qPLmmS_Qt93vabLFqgugfU0t7YBQ%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3d772c4548134be1a355a6050f972906&_e=tNZ4PnyIn5gL8aCweBwG8ox0aYP2h3m7Ej-aJ6Eytto7zVogPo2xwMy2_7J4BlPi8P869eeiM-bfxbLz08WUazqjU-WEHeu0t1ppdXQTUJdfUozUQQAdD1hFHKFNlaadMIddeg3g8k4QrnuEmZ33Cd8ZP4bow6eeM_QkzuAruirjCkxo5N-SVPHq7Xd0GD7b4nIuPFkj-QGPoIuxaTRGowLCq4srOpr0WUEdVskuTdcrkdZjVigXB4it9-F_u0Y9xNg7loojAz1qSxlfPKzSWxn7ag7Tor1cKWjboJfedLBsRqEB5YENIRCYD49wXid3b4sehZrV2TTEHKhs4ChQdQwYArZHnG40x2oPU5Eko9W2ubQdRsxI69_33gobK9xeAz2Tx0A9QdyzVmVFsC_i1Q%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference,** [**support me today and let’s kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=3d772c4548134be1a355a6050f972906&_e=tNZ4PnyIn5gL8aCweBwG8ox0aYP2h3m7Ej-aJ6Eytto7zVogPo2xwMy2_7J4BlPi8P869eeiM-bfxbLz08WUazqjU-WEHeu0t1ppdXQTUJdfUozUQQAdD1hFHKFNlaadMIddeg3g8k4QrnuEmZ33Cd8ZP4bow6eeM_QkzuAruiq_z1LctqxEe8E3Rpuezg7AMJYlYjVvydMa-PtgXczpUc_DuIIS-rJior7p4nWTianmQpwEqhcHvWKLKW33zTd-FN7-pIy6DYreC8XgrYyfK8UMKapcO-Rc7EO9H9BaFsFswSEcF0y2Na7DsEnZa568lNh1M9d7EVR6fcKJGh12SE0GiPdppm3hPt5QxsEQclniv0LXzQ9r9KsmURAjMW3R0QUyboH7H7p9GNO-PLE8rw%3D%3D)
