clean_body: Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | Fellow American, I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police, now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year. Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time. I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Peter,

With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, the RNC (Republican National Committee) is already identifying potential top races to invest in. **My race in Nevada’s 3rd District is one they’re looking at seriously.**

My team and I have been putting in extra time working the phones, writing emails and keeping you up to date of where our campaign stands. This summer-time push is not for nothing, Peter: **[We need to show the RNC that my campaign has the necessary infrastructure to raise $50,000 online in the first two months following the relaunch of my digital campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e903c585ef584ae3af7e1df260f3c348&_e=m4YQlYxKYg-9-xMatseqcTpfgjmZ9Xy3pb725nc51j_2j95WuI5qlcQsW1fbJdL2EcUcyLNh0BOlIA8g68wbsjggR6N5Fxd7CiwGZyN3H_esfHmYK2ZrkSqwvL-1ane-uCkObeofIhYVfwS43OkicVv5lA7NCAP5Aqlp5La9e4uSWvx_5q7kOIO5mzoyDVpv320bM-cTSxOotznprop5O7vVvfT-BeWg-J7mfoCN286EfQY7TsOd88l-KGzb3lGMszpjmQATxkjv4Np5gGz0NKHKZlXdsPkE9uW0D-kzH5C8gXr5S3ZB5oxG2SPgIJ22-Fl0Is54baitQDMbd8vZPMJPd6E_PpL8377Fg2ATh-SIvKyVT8cUmOcZRuCv1ok-N-0Q7W3-YNmEz_sdx9fshbp9fryyVq9tLlaMLY3OeIq-wjWRQIsdvDRU-VhKN5RMq15L1tyXbJ4BlT7tasWbOA%3D%3D)**

_If we reach this goal, we may qualify for their “On the Radar” program, which assists standout candidates in battleground districts._

**[I am asking each valuable member of the America first movement to pitch in just $10 right now to hit this goal. clean_body: Hala Ayala will be a fantastic Lieutenant Governor for Virginia -- but first, she needs our full support right now. | | | Derek, Hala Ayala will be a fantastic Lieutenant Governor for Virginia -- but first, she needs our full support right now. This is a pivotal election for Virginia. Hala has been a bold voice on gun violence prevention, access to affordable health care, and our state’s pandemic recovery. With her leadership, we will continue to make the progress we need -- but if we fall short, everything we’re fighting for is at risk. = We’ve done incredible work together to make Virginia a blue state -- but we all know how fragile our progress has been. We can’t take anything for granted. Hala needs grassroots supporters like you to make sure her campaign reaches all Virginians. Can Hala count on you to join us in the fight? = Thank you, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| Some may just call it another Biden “gaffe”, but last week during his CNN Townhall, Biden admitted he’s aiming to ban handguns in America. On the campaign trail, Biden made personal attacks to Second Amendment supporters, going so far as to tell a union member and 2A advocate he was “full of s***”. As President, he’s already made numerous **dangerous gun grab** executive actions and nominated a gun control activist to the ATF. **Now he’s ramping up his attacks on the Second Amendment and taking direct aim at the firearms everyday Americans use to protect their families.** Biden doesn’t respect our Second Amendment rights, and he despises the people who do. In Congress, I’m doing everything in my power to safeguard the Second Amendment and protect your constitutional rights. I need you to help take a stand against Joe Biden’s dangerous attacks on the Second Amendment.

Peter -- There’s a lot of terrible news in politics right now: The insurrection, GOP voter suppression, hate and division.

**But despite that, I want to focus on all we’ve accomplished:** Majorities in the House and Senate, a Democrat in the White House, pandemic relief for struggling families, a child tax credit, and truly so much more.

And as I look towards the future, I see a lot of room for optimism. I believe we can hold on to our House and Senate majority, re-elect President Biden, and continue building up our democracy.

**But the only reason we can finally begin to see some light at the end of the tunnel is because of you, Peter.** Because you’ve stepped up, helped us reach our goals, voted Trump out of office, and so much more.

But we can’t stop now.

We have a major fundraising goal at the end of July -- but we only need to raise $5,000 to reach it! I’ve seen this team accomplish so much, so I know we can do this.

clean_body: You’ve helped us so much. | = Peter -- There’s a lot of terrible news in politics right now: The insurrection, GOP voter suppression, hate and division. But despite that, I want to focus on all we’ve accomplished: Majorities in the House and Senate, a Democrat in the White House, pandemic relief for struggling families, a child tax credit, and truly so much more. And as I look towards the future, I see a lot of room for optimism. I believe we can hold on to our House and Senate majority, re-elect President Biden, and continue building up our democracy. But the only reason we can finally begin to see some light at the end of the tunnel is because of you, Peter. Because you’ve stepped up, helped us reach our goals, voted Trump out of office, and so much more. But we can’t stop now. We have a major fundraising goal at the end of July -- but we only need to raise $5,000 to reach it! I’ve seen this team accomplish so much, so I know we can do this. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you. name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Can we explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Anything you can do to help would mean so much to Erica and our campaign.
#
As we approach our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of Q3 on Saturday, we want to take a moment to explain why [**making your first $5 donation to our campaign will go a long way, if you’re able to chip in.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7111?refcode=em20210728-293&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=293%2E3698%2ER8g_dn)
1. **Erica is the only candidate fighting for the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and ending the filibuster** — our primary, establishment opponents, on the other hand, are afraid of being bold. Erica is our movement’s best chance to elect a truly progressive senator in North Carolina.
2. **Our campaign is building support statewide for Erica *right now,*** and reaching our July 2021 goal is a critical step in our plan to win this U.S. Senate seat. If we fall short, we may have to scale back our plans.
3. **Our fundraising model depends on $5, $10, and $20 contributions at a time.** From day one, Erica pledged not to take a cent from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry — we’re building our campaign the right way through small-dollar donations from people like you who believe in our progressive vision.

[**If you're able to make a donation of $5 — or anything you can — it will go a long way to helping us raise the $2,301 we need to reach our July 2021 goal and power our campaign to elect Erica to the U.S. Senate and flip North Carolina blue.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7111?refcode=em20210728-293&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=293%2E3698%2ER8g_dn)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7111?refcode=em20210728-293&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=293%2E3698%2ER8g_dn)**
Anything you can do to help would mean so much to Erica and our campaign.
Many thanks,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210728-293-footer&t=22&refcode2=293_3698_R8g_dn&akid=293%2E3698%2ER8g_dn)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=293%2E3698%2ER8g_dn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=293%2E3698%2ER8g_dn)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Official AOC Shop
subject: New 'Tax the Rich' items
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You can now rep the ‘Tax the Rich’ movement not just on your sleeves – but on a sticker, hat, mug, or tote bag.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210728-2301-header&t=1&akid=2301%2E2526796%2Eb-4CO9)
You may have seen or heard about our ‘Tax the Rich’ sweatshirt. Fox News dedicated an entire segment to it back in December when we launched it.
**We’re excited to announce that you can now rep the ‘Tax the Rich’ movement not just on your sleeves – but on a sticker, hat, mug, or tote bag.**
[If you agree we must close the historic wealth inequality gap in our country by taxing the rich, get a ‘Tax the Rich’ hat, mug, tote bag, sticker, or t-shirt to support this movement and power our local organizing initiatives.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9252?t=2&akid=2301%2E2526796%2Eb-4CO9)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9252?t=3&akid=2301%2E2526796%2Eb-4CO9)
As we work to reshape our economy and make it work for everyone — not just the people at the top — taxing the rich is the clear and necessary solution.
Right now, the super rich pay lower taxes than the poorest Americans. Seems hard to believe, right? But it’s true.1 Meanwhile two men — Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos — own more wealth than the bottom 40% of Americans combined.2 It’s not okay.
[**Alexandria is fighting to make the ultra rich pay their fair share in taxes and make our economy work for working families. Your purchase of a ‘Tax the Rich’ item — made in the U.S. by union workers paid a living wage — will help fund this work together.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9252?t=4&akid=2301%2E2526796%2Eb-4CO9)
Pa’lante,
Team AOC
1 - [The New York Times
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8911?t=5&akid=2301%2E2526796%2Eb-4CO9)2 - [Bernie Sanders](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8912?t=6&akid=2301%2E2526796%2Eb-4CO9)

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33148836/298012253/1639334829?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjEwZmRhYy0xMGYwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd4_c91KW0gc7c1gKeg7Y5kovZjBlVo5jUInhtaZTiA=)

**We’re up against an important End of Month Deadline in four short days, and it’s going to take all hands on deck to defeat corrupt Madison Cawthorn.**

From wasting your taxpayer dollars on out-of-state luxury hotel rooms to inciting the January 6 insurrection, Cawthorn embodies everything wrong with modern American politics.

**We deserve better.** But to be in the best possible position to beat him, we’re counting on a groundswell of support to hit our crucial $20,000 End of Month fundraising goal.

It sounds like a lofty goal, but if we hit it, my campaign guarantees we’ll be in the best possible spot to defeat Cawthorn.

**So please, I’m asking again:** **[Will you chip in $3 to defeat Madison Cawthorn?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33148843/298012261/1612211699?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20210728_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjEwZmRhYy0xMGYwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd4_c91KW0gc7c1gKeg7Y5kovZjBlVo5jUInhtaZTiA=)**

Peter - Can you believe this?

New York Democrats are trying to block Chick-fil-A from state rest stops.

I hope this threat is all bluster from left-wing New York politicians, but I'm afraid it's not.

If government limits a commercial business because the business exercises its First Amendment rights, it would set a horrible precedent. **It would also be ferociously opposed by many Members of Congress,_including me._**

When federal funds are shared with states, it never enters my mind to look at the politics of the state on hot-button social issues to determine whether they should be eligible to receive funding. Such a move by New York against Chick-fil-A would create unnecessary upheaval at a time when the country needs to move forward in respecting sincerely held differences of opinion.

The actions by the Left in New York make one thing clear: **"cancel culture" has run amok in America, and it is more important than ever to have elected officials who will stand up to these ridiculous ploys by the Radical Left.**

**That's why we need to reclaim the majority in the United States Senate.**

From rising inflation to chaos at the southern border, it's clear that the Democrats' control in Washington is dangerous to the future of our nation. We must do whatever we can to restore the conservative reforms of the last 4 years, **[but I need your help.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=366beee5b85f4bb09f832e7823170c02&_e=Mo1-pMmI35bFH7XaCGNwXV4oLAFSXzyyz_UEyQ7213bPSpMLUs7wQMsNQrgl4NkPdZH6Tc-s57KuBpnJ2DkYuNuBEaOed7rif9yYSxRfNr8gW3e7Nk0i51Hrh4TEO9rdcSiJvJphbwpPqeWfmOsw9jzP7fxKhPnNRZywPF2miAZsBkbfpfqw0zRYqD4qC56cnVnHir_-EbsL64g8OoGHE4fix8gV8S8ePaHVcEG2-BWzCOV6F79mi0a8ePnn0xQA_eXVqw4Xm2KwOjynMEZBxdR3hN8FDzEzMjcGZY66fAfpOgG0D0ti7ADYY0Z5krbVlyEQ9wKAamA32O713jJhpCgaGW4hl4XL7Efg4_7JXEryaxFnYWesMMNW8P-ihZXQbja8i-gQ1g4udWSVDJYs9S35CvYMZxwTuz69Cpdq0JF11bMkzqUPcLQ49oFf95SK5oyvybd63AemnjdhscssXuLke_5qYEPPAswpsQ_f1F0%3D)**

Chick-fil-A is a lawful business with a great product. I love their food, their service, and their people. No private company, including Chick-fil-A, should be punished for their beliefs.

**[Will you join me in standing up to the Radical Left and "cancel culture"? Will you donate $5 or $10 to help us beat some of these liberals next year and Restore the Majority in the Senate?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=366beee5b85f4bb09f832e7823170c02&_e=Mo1-pMmI35bFH7XaCGNwXV4oLAFSXzyyz_UEyQ7213bPSpMLUs7wQMsNQrgl4NkPdZH6Tc-s57KuBpnJ2DkYuNuBEaOed7rif9yYSxRfNr8gW3e7Nk0i51Hrh4TEO9rdcSiJvJphbwpPqeWfmOsw9jzP7fxKhPnNRZywPF2miAZsBkbfpfqw0zRYqD4qC56cnVnHir_-EbsL64g8OoGHE4fix8gV8S8ePaHVcEG2-BWzCOV6F79mi0a8ePnn0xQA_eXVqw4Xm2KwOjynMEZBxSXWNX7GW4-NMnQTs2yHgApcl6KNDiVBoUStWRQZbBnEfoGk1g6XYKD_E7MdzJKMATaDThRKDBCJqMiaBbVHdYh0kfOVj2b8cGd3Q2Ulsj9Nlxi0NREACkAUaWaSTuZfUsFRPjARA7LyNii9bhSGSvUCq0iMivn7yuiPlplBvuVVUGsV9kboVtfAp-iFtQHftVfi8_NTRTe3WfOx4CWIPeo%3D)**

If government limits a commercial business because the business exercises its First Amendment rights, it would set a horrible precedent. It would also be ferociously opposed by many Members of Congress,including me. When federal funds are shared with states, it never enters my mind to look at the politics of the state on hot-button social issues to determine whether they should be eligible to receive funding. Such a move by New York against Chick-fil-A would create unnecessary upheaval at a time when the country needs to move forward in respecting sincerely held differences of opinion. The actions by the Left in New York make one thing clear: "cancel culture" has run amok in America, and it is more important than ever to have elected officials who will stand up to these ridiculous ploys by the Radical Left. That's why we need to reclaim the majority in the United States Senate. From rising inflation to chaos at the southern border, it's clear that the Democrats' control in Washington is dangerous to the future of our nation. We must do whatever we can to restore the conservative reforms of the last 4 years, Chick-fil-A is a lawful business with a great product. I love their food, their service, and their people. No private company, including Chick-fil-A, should be punished for their beliefs. I hope you're with me, Peter. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. The Left's crusade against Chick-fil-A is just another reason why we need to push back on "cancel culture," beat the liberals at the polls, and reclaim the Senate majority next year. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Response requested: Kavanaugh, FBI opinion poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | **MSNBC: The 4,500 tips reported to the FBI about Brett Kavanaugh's suitability to serve as a Supreme Court justice largely went uninvestigated.** We're speechless, Peter. Remember Brett Kavanaugh's chaotic confirmation process? We have learned that, for the first time in Supreme Court confirmation history, the FBI opened a public tip hotline for anyone with information about then-nominee Brett Kavanaugh's moral fitness to serve. The tip line received an eye-popping 4,500 calls. Few, if any, were investigated. Then the FBI handed the records over to Donald Trump's White House. You know what happened next, Peter. Kavanaugh was confirmed to what is now one of the most partisan, right-wing Supreme Court rosters in American history. **In less than one year, legal protections for abortion, DACA, and the environment have been dealt serious existential blows.** There are 4,500 serious, credible tips about Brett Kavanaugh's ability to do his job sitting in a drawer at FBI headquarters. This gross negligence would never happen under President Joe Biden's watch. Now, we're doing everything we can to fight back against the GOP's corrupt political operation at the highest levels of government. **But we need to know if our most engaged supporters are with us, Peter. Please, let us know:** **Do you think the FBI should investigate Brett Kavanaugh?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33149576/298013202/-1709815635?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNzFhY2RkLTE0ZjAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIjvR8WfKUP-WOQ_PeJE4_T-M2e_zdkZjqte4Dtp6QY=&emci=61a7bf9c-edef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0171acdd-14f0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33149577/298013203/-1709815635?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNzFhY2RkLTE0ZjAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIjvR8WfKUP-WOQ_PeJE4_T-M2e_zdkZjqte4Dtp6QY=&emci=61a7bf9c-edef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0171acdd-14f0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

Thank you for your response. We deserve to know the truth about Brett Kavanaugh's past and whether he is truly fit to serve on the highest court in our country.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33149578/298013204/-1709815635?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNzFhY2RkLTE0ZjAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XIjvR8WfKUP-WOQ_PeJE4_T-M2e_zdkZjqte4Dtp6QY=&emci=61a7bf9c-edef-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0171acdd-14f0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5546903)**
---

P.S. Peter, Democrats are projected to lose our razor-thin Senate majority in 2022. If we had held the Senate in 2018, Brett Kavanaugh would have never been confirmed. clean_body: | | | MSNBC: The 4,500 tips reported to the FBI about Brett Kavanaugh's suitability to serve as a Supreme Court justice largely went uninvestigated. We're speechless, Peter. Remember Brett Kavanaugh's chaotic confirmation process? We have learned that, for the first time in Supreme Court confirmation history, the FBI opened a public tip hotline for anyone with information about then-nominee Brett Kavanaugh's moral fitness to serve. The tip line received an eye-popping 4,500 calls. Few, if any, were investigated. Then the FBI handed the records over to Donald Trump's White House. You know what happened next, Peter. Kavanaugh was confirmed to what is now one of the most partisan, right-wing Supreme Court rosters in American history. In less than one year, legal protections for abortion, DACA, and the environment have been dealt serious existential blows. There are 4,500 serious, credible tips about Brett Kavanaugh's ability to do his job sitting in a drawer at FBI headquarters. This gross negligence would never happen under President Joe Biden's watch. Now, we're doing everything we can to fight back against the GOP's corrupt political operation at the highest levels of government. But we need to know if our most engaged supporters are with us, Peter. Please, let us know: Do you think the FBI should investigate Brett Kavanaugh? | | | ---|---|--- Thank you for your response. We deserve to know the truth about Brett Kavanaugh's past and whether he is truly fit to serve on the highest court in our country. \- When Democrats Turn Out P.S. Peter, Democrats are projected to lose our razor-thin Senate majority in 2022. If we had held the Senate in 2018, Brett Kavanaugh would have never been confirmed. If we can give our bold progressive leaders the tools they need to fight back against the Republican electioneering machine, we might be able to turn the tide. Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Terry said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled **"The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022"** ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: _“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_ We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** [**This is where you come in, Derek: If you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FmsUiOQaD1LGqY__KYAnjIu4iFSCWju3dY_7Zp3Wdn8PZ6vxOPoCKdVZjoCHv3f8hfl2LM0orSzXwBy5e2WJLd3Jw3VOMy04I1nSH47oLygRfuVKNEO3vvPT_dMgh92Ea0rOJUHvNjltMBMSqbwkPvKtzULWsLqGcp97dnPvFu-Sptvu-vKRE-pPQfwyBxfEOWgCTb6foBuX7OCkj--7u29vvd6Z9Z9EktERsJi-nYXOJtchrlQShGtkd0u0-o4QyvczVEPmdaQNKpJ9Cm5jYNljLpY_QAnEZ6j3np02z3ki/3dz/7Yi3caJ6SUWn4P_tziyoOA/h1/bg8aJSu549_fupJa3SKyRgz0pYycV3I66uAdep3vFVk) You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Big Announcement: Join the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Big announcement! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3f29f7139c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
**My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona, former policeman, firefighter, and paramedic, and proud leader of the Arizona Business community.**

_I am a pro-Trump, America-first Patriot, and most importantly I’m the first guy who took a stand and said NO; I listened to you when many others could not be bothered. I led a team of courageous legislators who joined me in the very first hearing that launched a nationwide phenomenon._

**America’s Audit is revolutionary. It is bold. It is groundbreaking. And it is working.**

_And now it’s time to take it to the next level! Can you help me in my campaign for Secretary of State in Arizona?_
*Join the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project*
**I have been writing you for a while that America’s Audit in Maricopa County is just the start. **

>From this audit, there are really two difficult, but necessary prongs of our strategy: The first is to spread America’s Audit all around the country...

---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cb215f0c12&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And the second is to systematically protect the ballot box through meaningful legislation that will prevent voter fraud.

**Accusation without action is meaningless. And I believe strong and immediate action is required. ****That's why** [I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e6fba96597&e=44b8c466b0)!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=56d9f8a158&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **I have pushed for significant and unprecedented measures to protect our elections.**
_The Epoch Times_ reports:

_Finchem said there is no ballot integrity initiative anywhere else in the country at the moment, but in his travels, he’s encountered a high level of bipartisan interest._

_“Ballot integrity, a critical part of the election process, relies on fraud countermeasures to keep the fakes out of the system,” Finchem said in a 3-minute video announcing the project._

_“Election integrity—more broadly—relies on full-spectrum transparency. We can have full-spectrum transparency by making every ballot image a public record, available to everyone, all the time. Putting sunshine on something is a great disinfectant, and there is no reason not to do this.”_

_Finchem said the U.S. Treasury relies on currency-grade fraud countermeasures to prevent counterfeiting. He said Arizona’s election ballots should be no less secure and hard to fake or duplicate._

_The object is to create a “defined universe of ballots,” as opposed to “the wild west” of mail-in ballots during the 2020 presidential election, Finchem told The Epoch Times._

_While the concept of ballot countermeasures is Finchem’s idea, the execution will be done by Authentix authentication solutions, the Texas-based firm Finchem contacted to design and implement a secure ballot system for Arizona._

**Safeguards in place will include but not be limited to:**
* **Watermarks**
* **Ballot Identification Numbers**
* **QR Codes**
* **Embedded Holograms**

**We have to protect our elections like we protect our money.**

**_When you don’t protect the money, you get runaway inflation. When you don’t protect the ballot, you get election fraud._**

Folks, it’s that simple. And this is why I need your help to win my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona.

**The Secretary of State is responsible for overseeing Arizona’s elections. And if I do not win this election, there is no guarantee that anyone will be able to actually protect these ballots.**

_As a State Representative, I stood up to the Left, I held the initial Election Integrity hearings, I spearheaded America’s Audit, and I have spoken around the country spreading the movement._

**_Imagine what I could do as Secretary of State of Arizona!_**

[_Donate GENEROUSLY today to help us secure Arizona’s ballots and spread them nationwide!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a25a7c19d9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e3723b37ca&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **My name is Mark Finchem. I am a true America First patriot, and I am THE guy you want in your corner defending our elections from the Radical Left.**

_We have seen what they have done, but by no means have we seen the extent of what they are capable of._

**They are just getting started. And so are we. We have to send a HUGE message, and the message has to be this year, before the election in 2022.**

[Can you help me send that message?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=90072f4ed8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _[Donate TODAY to join our movement and send a message to the Radical Left that you can’t mess with Arizona Elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4e7fce7162&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d96138902c&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5f43a659af&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=154323cd6d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=154323cd6d).
---

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
When voters across America delivered Democrats the House, the Senate, and the White House, they gave them a clear mandate for transformative change and a historic governing opportunity to meet the overlapping crises we face at the scale it demands.
**And yet, Arizona Senator Kyrsten Sinema announced today that a historic investment in President Biden’s jobs and families plan is a bridge too far:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210728?refcode=em20210728-502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=502_420207_EBxRj2&akid=502%2E420207%2EEBxRj2)
Let’s be very clear about what this means: Senator Sinema isn’t just coming out against a price tag. She’s threatening to block a package that would finally deliver child care, paid leave, community college, Medicare expansion, climate action, a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers, affordable housing, and so much more.
**That’s why we’re asking:[If you’re with Pramila in the fight to go big, bold, and fast on a spending bill that fully invests in working people, can you chip in $3 or more to our campaign today? This fight is far from over — and with your help today, we’re going to put the pressure on to get this done.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210728?refcode=em20210728-502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=502_420207_EBxRj2&akid=502%2E420207%2EEBxRj2)**
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210728?refcode=em20210728-502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=502_420207_EBxRj2&akid=502%2E420207%2EEBxRj2)**
The risk isn't going too big — _it's not going big enough._
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210728-502-footer&t=23&refcode2=502_420207_EBxRj2&akid=502%2E420207%2EEBxRj2)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
